      "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport hashlib\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nimport yaml\n\n\nROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\nSCRIPTS = ROOT / \"scripts\"\nif str(SCRIPTS) not in sys.path:\n    sys.path.insert(0, str(SCRIPTS))\n\nPR_REVIEW_MATRIX = [\n    (\"verification-codex\", \"verification-evidence\", \"internal-agent\", False, \"verification\"),\n    (\"verification-claude\", \"verification-evidence\", \"claude-code\", True, \"verification\"),\n    (\"architecture-codex\", \"architecture-process\", \"internal-agent\", False, \"architecture\"),\n    (\"architecture-claude\", \"architecture-process\", \"claude-code\", True, \"architecture\"),\n    (\"adversarial-codex\", \"adversarial-authority\", \"internal-agent\", False, \"adversarial\"),\n    (\"adversarial-claude\", \"adversarial-authority\", \"claude-code\", True, \"adversarial\"),\n]\nPROVIDER_CONFIG_CONTENT = (ROOT / \"templates\" / \"external-review-provider.yaml\").read_text(\n    encoding=\"utf-8\"\n)\nFORBIDDEN_CLAUDE_ENV = [\n    \"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\",\n    \"ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN\",\n    \"ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL\",\n    \"CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK\",\n    \"CLAUDE_CODE_USE_VERTEX\",\n]\n\n\ndef load_evaluator():\n    from repo_validation.pr_merge_readiness import evaluate_pr_merge_readiness_report\n\n    return evaluate_pr_merge_readiness_report\n\n\ndef write_evidence(root: Path, *paths: str) -> None:\n    for ref in paths:\n        path = root / ref\n        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        path.write_text(f\"evidence for {ref}\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n\ndef write_report(root: Path, report: dict) -> Path:\n    path = root / \"pr-merge-readiness-report.json\"\n    path.write_text(json.dumps(report, indent=2) + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    human_decisions_path = root / \"human-decisions.yaml\"\n    if human_decisions_path.is_file():\n        data = yaml.safe_load(human_decisions_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n        if isinstance(data, dict) and isinstance(data.get(\"decisions\"), list):\n            changed = False\n            for item in data[\"decisions\"]:\n                if not isinstance(item, dict):\n                    continue\n                if item.get(\"decision_id\") != \"merge.acceptance\":\n                    continue\n                affected = item.get(\"affected_artifacts\")\n                if not isinstance(affected, list) or \"pr-merge-readiness-report.json\" not in affected:\n                    continue\n                if item.get(\"status\") != \"confirmed\" or item.get(\"answered_by\") != \"human\":\n                    continue\n                item[\"material_change_id\"] = report.get(\"material_change_id\")\n                item[\"report_hash\"] = file_sha(path)\n                changed = True\n            if changed:\n                human_decisions_path.write_text(\n                    yaml.safe_dump(data, sort_keys=False),\n                    encoding=\"utf-8\",\n                )\n    return path\n\n\ndef file_sha(path: Path) -> str:\n    return \"sha256:\" + hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()\n\n\ndef text_sha(text: str) -> str:\n    return \"sha256:\" + hashlib.sha256(text.encode(\"utf-8\")).hexdigest()\n\n\ndef redacted_raw_summary(reviewer: str) -> str:\n    return f\"Redacted raw provider output summary for {reviewer}.\\n\"\n\n\ndef attach_raw_provider_output(root: Path, reviewer: str, content: str = '{\"result\":\"ok\"}\\n') -> None:\n    raw_path = root / \"raw\" / f\"{reviewer}.raw.json\"\n    raw_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    raw_path.write_text(content, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    invocation_path = root / f\"reviewer-invocation.{reviewer}.json\"\n    invocation = json.loads(invocation_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    invocation[\"raw_output_path\"] = f\"raw/{reviewer}.raw.json\"\n    invocation[\"raw_output_hash\"] = file_sha(raw_path)\n    invocation_path.write_text(json.dumps(invocation, indent=2) + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n\ndef review_context(reviewer: str) -> dict:\n    return {\n        \"run_id\": \"2026-06-22-pr-merge-readiness-example\",\n        \"material_change_id\": \"pr-merge-readiness-example-change\",\n        \"review_packet_path\": f\"review-packets/{reviewer}.json\",\n        \"reviewer_instance_id\": reviewer,\n    }\n\n\ndef invocation_metadata(reviewer: str) -> dict:\n    reviewer_role = reviewer.removesuffix(\"-claude\").removesuffix(\"-codex\")\n    return {\n        \"provider\": \"claude-code\",\n        \"reviewer_role\": reviewer_role,\n        \"billing_mode\": \"subscription-local\",\n        \"api_key_usage_forbidden\": True,\n        \"context_policy\": {\n            \"start_mode\": \"fresh_context\",\n            \"fork_conversation_context\": False,\n            \"session_persistence\": False,\n            \"input_mode\": \"review_packet\",\n        },\n        \"forbidden_env_checked\": FORBIDDEN_CLAUDE_ENV,\n        \"command\": \"claude -p <stdin> --output-format json --permission-mode default --tools \\\"\\\" --model opus --effort max --max-turns 3 --no-session-persistence\",\n        \"wrapper\": \"scripts/reviewers/run_external_reviewer.py\",\n        \"provider_config_path\": \"external-reviewers/claude-code.yaml\",\n        \"provider_config_hash\": \"sha256:\" + hashlib.sha256(PROVIDER_CONFIG_CONTENT.encode(\"utf-8\")).hexdigest(),\n        \"execution_mode\": \"real\",\n        \"permission_mode\": \"default\",\n        \"prompt_transport\": \"stdin\",\n        \"sandbox_mode\": \"require_escalated\",\n        \"tools\": \"\",\n        \"output_format\": \"json\",\n        \"requested_model\": \"opus\",\n        \"requested_effort\": \"max\",\n        \"provider_models_used\": [\"claude-opus-4-8\"],\n        \"max_turns\": 3,\n        \"timeout_seconds\": 900,\n        \"started_at\": \"2026-06-22T10:00:00Z\",\n        \"finished_at\": \"2026-06-22T10:01:00Z\",\n        \"exit_code\": 0,\n        \"raw_output_path\": \"\",\n        \"raw_output_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"1\" * 64,\n        \"normalized_output_path\": f\"reviewer-report.{reviewer}.json\",\n        \"normalized_output_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"2\" * 64,\n        \"input_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"3\" * 64,\n        \"prompt_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"4\" * 64,\n        \"review_prompt_contract_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"5\" * 64,\n        \"role_contract_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"6\" * 64,\n        \"rubric_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"7\" * 64,\n        \"schema_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"8\" * 64,\n    }\n\n\ndef complete_report() -> dict:\n    return {\n        \"version\": 1,\n        \"artifact_kind\": \"pr_merge_readiness_report\",\n        \"workflow\": \"pr-merge-readiness\",\n        \"run_id\": \"2026-06-22-pr-merge-readiness-example\",\n        \"material_change_id\": \"pr-merge-readiness-example-change\",\n        \"branch\": {\n            \"name\": \"codex/pr-merge-readiness\",\n            \"base\": \"main\",\n            \"commit_range\": \"main..HEAD\",\n            \"worktree_state\": \"clean\",\n        },\n        \"status\": \"accepted_merge_ready\",\n        \"checks\": [\n            {\n                \"id\": \"repo-validation\",\n                \"category\": \"verification\",\n                \"status\": \"pass\",\n                \"evidence_path\": \"evidence/repo-validation.log\",\n            },\n            {\n                \"id\": \"pytest\",\n                \"category\": \"test\",\n                \"status\": \"pass\",\n                \"evidence_path\": \"evidence/pytest.log\",\n            },\n        ],\n        \"review_requirements\": {\n            \"review_prompt_contract_path\": \"review-prompt-contract.yaml\",\n            \"rubric_path\": \"rubric.json\",\n            \"required_reviews\": [\n                {\n                    \"id\": reviewer,\n                    \"topic\": topic,\n                    \"role\": role,\n                    \"provider\": provider,\n                    \"required_live\": required_live,\n                }\n                for reviewer, topic, provider, required_live, role in PR_REVIEW_MATRIX\n            ]\n        },\n        \"reviews\": [\n            {\n                \"id\": reviewer,\n                \"topic\": topic,\n                \"provider\": provider,\n                \"status\": \"pass\",\n                \"packet_path\": f\"review-packets/{reviewer}.json\",\n                \"prompt_path\": f\"review-prompts/{reviewer}.md\",\n                \"role_contract_path\": f\"profiles/reviewer_roles/{role}.yaml\",\n                \"report_path\": f\"reviewer-report.{reviewer}.json\",\n                \"packet_prepared_at\": \"2026-06-22T10:00:00Z\",\n                \"latest_material_change_at\": \"2026-06-22T09:30:00Z\",\n            }\n            for reviewer, topic, provider, _required_live, role in PR_REVIEW_MATRIX\n        ],\n        \"external_review_evidence\": [\n            {\n                \"provider\": \"claude-code\",\n                \"mode\": \"live\",\n                \"required_live\": True,\n                \"status\": \"pass\",\n                \"normalized_report_path\": f\"reviewer-report.{reviewer}.json\",\n                \"invocation_metadata_path\": f\"reviewer-invocation.{reviewer}.json\",\n                \"raw_output\": {\n                    \"persistence\": \"redacted\",\n                    \"redaction_reason\": \"live output may contain local workspace context\",\n                    \"artifact_path\": f\"evidence/raw/{reviewer}.redacted-summary.md\",\n                    \"artifact_hash\": text_sha(redacted_raw_summary(reviewer)),\n                },\n            }\n            for reviewer, _topic, provider, _required_live, _role in PR_REVIEW_MATRIX\n            if provider == \"claude-code\"\n        ],\n        \"candidate_findings\": [],\n        \"human_decision\": {\n            \"status\": \"accepted\",\n            \"decision_id\": \"merge.acceptance\",\n            \"path\": \"human-decisions.yaml\",\n        },\n        \"self_application\": {\n            \"enabled\": True,\n            \"application_mode\": \"self_application_bootstrap\",\n            \"proof_claim\": \"bootstrap_not_self_proof\",\n        },\n        \"residual_limitations\": [],\n    }\n\n\ndef prepare_complete_evidence(root: Path) -> None:\n    (root / \"schemas\").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    for schema_name in [\n        \"human-decisions.schema.json\",\n        \"review-prompt-contract.schema.json\",\n        \"reviewer-invocation.schema.json\",\n        \"reviewer-report.schema.json\",\n    ]:\n        (root / \"schemas\" / schema_name).write_text(\n            (ROOT / \"schemas\" / schema_name).read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"),\n            encoding=\"utf-8\",\n        )\n    write_evidence(\n        root,\n        \"evidence/repo-validation.log\",\n        \"evidence/pytest.log\",\n    )\n    provider_config = root / \"external-reviewers\" / \"claude-code.yaml\"\n    provider_config.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    provider_config.write_text(PROVIDER_CONFIG_CONTENT, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    (root / \"review-prompt-contract.yaml\").write_text(\"reviewer_set: []\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    (root / \"rubric.json\").write_text('{\"same_output_schema\":true}\\n', encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    for role in sorted({item[4] for item in PR_REVIEW_MATRIX} | {\"generalist\"}):\n        role_path = root / \"profiles\" / \"reviewer_roles\" / f\"{role}.yaml\"\n        role_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        role_path.write_text(f\"id: {role}\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    for reviewer, topic, provider, _required_live, role in PR_REVIEW_MATRIX:\n        packet_path = root / \"review-packets\" / f\"{reviewer}.json\"\n        packet_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        packet_path.write_text(\n            json.dumps(\n                {\n                    \"agentsflow_version\": \"0.2\",\n                    \"workflow\": \"pr-merge-readiness\",\n                    \"run_id\": \"2026-06-22-pr-merge-readiness-example\",\n                    \"material_change_id\": \"pr-merge-readiness-example-change\",\n                    \"review_packet_path\": f\"review-packets/{reviewer}.json\",\n                    \"reviewer_instance_id\": reviewer,\n                    \"reviewer_role\": role,\n                    \"topic\": topic,\n                },\n                indent=2,\n            )\n            + \"\\n\",\n            encoding=\"utf-8\",\n        )\n        prompt_path = root / \"review-prompts\" / f\"{reviewer}.md\"\n        prompt_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        prompt_path.write_text(f\"Review prompt for {reviewer}\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n        (root / f\"reviewer-report.{reviewer}.json\").write_text(\n            json.dumps(\n                {\n                    \"reviewer\": {\n                        \"id\": reviewer,\n                        \"provider\": provider,\n                        \"role\": role,\n                        \"model\": \"opus\" if provider == \"claude-code\" else \"codex\",\n                    },\n                    \"summary\": \"No blockers in fixture.\",\n                    \"review_context\": review_context(reviewer),\n                    \"findings\": [],\n                },\n                indent=2,\n            )\n            + \"\\n\",\n            encoding=\"utf-8\",\n        )\n        if provider == \"claude-code\":\n            redacted_summary_path = root / \"evidence\" / \"raw\" / f\"{reviewer}.redacted-summary.md\"\n            redacted_summary_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n            redacted_summary_path.write_text(redacted_raw_summary(reviewer), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n            invocation = invocation_metadata(reviewer)\n            invocation[\"normalized_output_hash\"] = file_sha(root / f\"reviewer-report.{reviewer}.json\")\n            invocation[\"input_hash\"] = file_sha(root / \"review-packets\" / f\"{reviewer}.json\")\n            invocation[\"prompt_hash\"] = file_sha(root / \"review-prompts\" / f\"{reviewer}.md\")\n            invocation[\"review_prompt_contract_hash\"] = file_sha(root / \"review-prompt-contract.yaml\")\n            invocation[\"role_contract_hash\"] = file_sha(root / \"profiles\" / \"reviewer_roles\" / f\"{role}.yaml\")\n            invocation[\"rubric_hash\"] = file_sha(root / \"rubric.json\")\n            invocation[\"schema_hash\"] = file_sha(root / \"schemas\" / \"reviewer-report.schema.json\")\n            (root / f\"reviewer-invocation.{reviewer}.json\").write_text(\n                json.dumps(invocation, indent=2) + \"\\n\",\n                encoding=\"utf-8\",\n            )\n    (root / \"human-decisions.yaml\").write_text(\n        yaml.safe_dump(\n            {\n                \"version\": 1,\n                \"run_id\": \"2026-06-22-pr-merge-readiness-example\",\n                \"decisions\": [\n                    {\n                        \"decision_id\": \"merge.acceptance\",\n                        \"phase_id\": \"human_merge_decision\",\n                        \"question_ref\": \"merge.acceptance\",\n                        \"answer\": \"accepted\",\n                        \"status\": \"confirmed\",\n                        \"answered_by\": \"human\",\n                        \"classification\": \"blocking-material\",\n                        \"affected_artifacts\": [\"pr-merge-readiness-report.json\"],\n                    }\n                ],\n            },\n            sort_keys=False,\n        ),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n\n\ndef write_collision_control_fixture(\n    root: Path,\n    *,\n    finding_id: str = \"F-001\",\n    collision_batch_id: str = \"collision-F-001\",\n    control_conclusion: str = \"orchestrator-disposition-supported\",\n    completed_at: str = \"2026-06-22T10:00:00Z\",\n    prepared_at: str = \"2026-06-22T10:00:00Z\",\n) -> None:\n    for reviewer in [\"collision-control-a\", \"collision-control-b\"]:\n        (root / f\"reviewer-report.{reviewer}.json\").write_text(\n            json.dumps(\n                {\n                    \"reviewer\": {\n                        \"id\": reviewer,\n                        \"provider\": \"internal-agent\",\n                        \"role\": \"generalist\",\n                        \"model\": \"codex\",\n                    },\n                    \"summary\": \"Control reviewer accepts the orchestrator disposition.\",\n                    \"findings\": [],\n                    \"collision_control\": {\n                        \"collision_batch_id\": collision_batch_id,\n                        \"disputed_finding_ids\": [finding_id],\n                        \"control_conclusion\": control_conclusion,\n                        \"completed_at\": completed_at,\n                    },\n                },\n                indent=2,\n            )\n            + \"\\n\",\n            encoding=\"utf-8\",\n        )\n    (root / \"collision-control-review-prompt-contract.yaml\").write_text(\n        yaml.safe_dump(\n            {\n                \"version\": 1,\n                \"artifact_kind\": \"review_prompt_contract\",\n                \"artifact_scope\": \"run\",\n                \"identity\": {\n                    \"run_id\": \"2026-06-22-pr-merge-readiness-example\",\n                    \"workflow\": \"pr-merge-readiness\",\n                    \"phase_id\": \"collision_control\",\n                    \"review_profile\": \"collision-control\",\n                    \"composition\": \"control\",\n                    \"primary_gate\": False,\n                },\n                \"inputs\": {\n                    \"review_packet_schema\": \"schemas/review-packet.schema.json\",\n                    \"review_packets\": [\n                        {\n                            \"reviewer\": \"collision-control-a\",\n                            \"path\": \"review-packets/collision-control-a.json\",\n                            \"schema\": \"schemas/review-packet.schema.json\",\n                            \"packet_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"a\" * 64,\n                        },\n                        {\n                            \"reviewer\": \"collision-control-b\",\n                            \"path\": \"review-packets/collision-control-b.json\",\n                            \"schema\": \"schemas/review-packet.schema.json\",\n                            \"packet_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"b\" * 64,\n                        },\n                    ],\n                    \"output_schema\": \"schemas/reviewer-report.schema.json\",\n                    \"verification_gate_report\": \"evidence/repo-validation.log\",\n                },\n                \"reviewer_set\": [\n                    {\n                        \"instance_id\": \"collision-control-a\",\n                        \"role_id\": \"generalist\",\n                        \"role_contract\": \"profiles/reviewer_roles/generalist.yaml\",\n                        \"independent\": True,\n                    },\n                    {\n                        \"instance_id\": \"collision-control-b\",\n                        \"role_id\": \"generalist\",\n                        \"role_contract\": \"profiles/reviewer_roles/generalist.yaml\",\n                        \"independent\": True,\n                    },\n                ],\n                \"context_policy\": {\n                    \"start_mode\": \"fresh_context\",\n                    \"fork_conversation_context\": False,\n                    \"allowed_context_sources\": [\"review_packet\", \"referenced_artifacts\"],\n                },\n                \"permission_policy\": {\n                    \"read_only\": True,\n                    \"forbidden_actions\": [\"run_tests\", \"modify_files\"],\n                },\n                \"prompt_components\": {\n                    \"shared_base_instructions\": \"templates/review-prompts/base.md\",\n                    \"role_contract_source\": \"profiles/reviewer_roles/*.yaml\",\n                    \"finding_lifecycle\": \"candidate-unvalidated\",\n                    \"output_instructions\": \"schemas/reviewer-report.schema.json\",\n                },\n                \"prompt_policy\": {\n                    \"same_output_schema\": True,\n                },\n                \"rendered_prompts\": [\n                    {\n                        \"reviewer\": \"collision-control-a\",\n                        \"prompt_path\": \"review-prompts/collision-control-a.md\",\n                        \"prompt_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"c\" * 64,\n                        \"packet_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"a\" * 64,\n                        \"schema_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"d\" * 64,\n                        \"rubric_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"e\" * 64,\n                        \"role_contract_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"f\" * 64,\n                    },\n                    {\n                        \"reviewer\": \"collision-control-b\",\n                        \"prompt_path\": \"review-prompts/collision-control-b.md\",\n                        \"prompt_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"1\" * 64,\n                        \"packet_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"b\" * 64,\n                        \"schema_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"d\" * 64,\n                        \"rubric_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"e\" * 64,\n                        \"role_contract_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"f\" * 64,\n                    },\n                ],\n                \"collision_control\": {\n                    \"trigger\": \"rejected_or_downgraded_blocker_collision\",\n                    \"collision_batch_id\": collision_batch_id,\n                    \"control_reviewer_count\": 2,\n                    \"prepared_at\": prepared_at,\n                    \"disputed_findings\": [\n                        {\n                            \"finding_id\": finding_id,\n                            \"original_severity\": \"P1\",\n                            \"source_reviewer_report\": \"reviewer-report.verification-codex.json\",\n                            \"orchestrator_action\": \"rejected\",\n                        }\n                    ],\n                    \"orchestrator_collision_reason\": \"Fixture rejected P1 requires control review.\",\n                    \"evidence_references_checked\": [\"reviewer-report.verification-codex.json\"],\n                },\n                \"validation\": {\n                    \"schema\": \"schemas/review-prompt-contract.schema.json\",\n                    \"assembly_invariants\": [\"collision-control uses two reviewers\"],\n                },\n            },\n            sort_keys=False,\n        ),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n\n\ndef evaluate(tmp_path: Path, report: dict) -> dict:\n    prepare_complete_evidence(tmp_path)\n    path = write_report(tmp_path, report)\n    return load_evaluator()(tmp_path, path)\n\n\ndef test_complete_evidence_requires_human_decision(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n\n    result = evaluate(tmp_path, report)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"accepted_merge_ready\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is True\n    assert result[\"missing_evidence\"] == []\n    assert result[\"blockers\"] == []\n    assert result[\"human_decision\"][\"required\"] is True\n    assert result[\"human_decision\"][\"status\"] == \"accepted\"\n\n\ndef test_green_evidence_without_human_decision_is_not_accepted(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"awaiting_human_decision\"\n    report[\"human_decision\"] = {\"status\": \"missing\"}\n\n    result = evaluate(tmp_path, report)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"awaiting_human_decision\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"human_decision_missing\" in result[\"warnings\"]\n    assert \"accepted_merge_ready\" not in result.get(\"allowed_statuses\", [])\n\n\ndef test_missing_required_evidence_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"checks\"][0][\"evidence_path\"] = \"evidence/missing-repo-validation.log\"\n\n    result = evaluate(tmp_path, report)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"evidence/missing-repo-validation.log\" in result[\"missing_evidence\"]\n    assert \"missing_required_evidence\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_failed_check_status_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"rejected\"\n    report[\"checks\"][0][\"status\"] = \"fail\"\n\n    result = evaluate(tmp_path, report)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"rejected\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"failed_check:repo-validation\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_failed_review_status_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"rejected\"\n    report[\"reviews\"][0][\"status\"] = \"blocked\"\n\n    result = evaluate(tmp_path, report)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"rejected\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"failed_review:verification-codex\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_missing_required_review_topology_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"rejected\"\n    report[\"reviews\"] = []\n    report[\"external_review_evidence\"] = []\n\n    result = evaluate(tmp_path, report)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"missing_required_review:verification-codex\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n    assert \"missing_required_review:verification-claude\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n    assert \"live_claude_absent\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_underdeclared_pr_merge_review_topology_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    report[\"review_requirements\"][\"required_reviews\"] = report[\"review_requirements\"][\"required_reviews\"][:2]\n    report[\"reviews\"] = report[\"reviews\"][:2]\n    report[\"external_review_evidence\"] = report[\"external_review_evidence\"][:1]\n\n    result = evaluate(tmp_path, report)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"review_requirements_undeclared:architecture-codex\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n    assert \"missing_required_review:architecture-codex\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n    assert \"review_requirements_undeclared:adversarial-claude\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_required_live_false_for_claude_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    for required in report[\"review_requirements\"][\"required_reviews\"]:\n        if required[\"id\"] == \"verification-claude\":\n            required[\"required_live\"] = False\n\n    result = evaluate(tmp_path, report)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"required_live_claude_not_declared:verification-claude\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_required_review_role_binding_blocks_wrong_role(tmp_path: Path) \"external_review_invocation_role_mismatch:verification-claude\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_claude_invocation_input_hash_mismatch_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"blocked_external_review\"\n    prepare_complete_evidence(tmp_path)\n    invocation = invocation_metadata(\"verification-claude\")\n    invocation[\"input_hash\"] = \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64\n    invocation[\"normalized_output_hash\"] = file_sha(tmp_path / \"reviewer-report.verification-claude.json\")\n    invocation[\"prompt_hash\"] = file_sha(tmp_path / \"review-prompts\" / \"verification-claude.md\")\n    invocation[\"review_prompt_contract_hash\"] = file_sha(tmp_path / \"review-prompt-contract.yaml\")\n    invocation[\"role_contract_hash\"] = file_sha(tmp_path / \"profiles\" / \"reviewer_roles\" / \"verification.yaml\")\n    invocation[\"rubric_hash\"] = file_sha(tmp_path / \"rubric.json\")\n    invocation[\"schema_hash\"] = file_sha(tmp_path / \"schemas\" / \"reviewer-report.schema.json\")\n    (tmp_path / \"reviewer-invocation.verification-claude.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(invocation, indent=2) + \"\\n\",\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    path = write_report(tmp_path, report)\n\n    result = load_evaluator()(tmp_path, path)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"blocked_external_review\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"external_review_input_hash_mismatch:verification-claude\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_claude_invocation_rubric_hash_may_match_prompt_contract(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    prepare_complete_evidence(tmp_path)\n    prompt_contract = {\n        \"rendered_prompts\": [\n            {\n                \"reviewer\": \"verification-claude\",\n                \"rubric_hash\": \"sha256:\" + \"a\" * 64,\n            }\n        ]\n    }\n    (tmp_path / \"review-prompt-contract.yaml\").write_text(\n        yaml.safe_dump(prompt_contract, sort_keys=False),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    contract_hash = file_sha(tmp_path / \"review-prompt-contract.yaml\")\n    for reviewer, _topic, provider, _required_live, _role in PR_REVIEW_MATRIX:\n        if provider != \"claude-code\":\n            continue\n        path = tmp_path / f\"reviewer-invocation.{reviewer}.json\"\n        invocation = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n        invocation[\"review_prompt_contract_hash\"] = contract_hash\n        if reviewer == \"verification-claude\":\n            invocation[\"rubric_hash\"] = \"sha256:\" + \"a\" * 64\n        path.write_text(json.dumps(invocation, indent=2) + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n    result = load_evaluator()(tmp_path, write_report(tmp_path, report))\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"accepted_merge_ready\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is True\n    assert \"external_review_rubric_hash_mismatch:verification-claude\" not in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_malformed_reviewer_report_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    prepare_complete_evidence(tmp_path)\n    (tmp_path / \"reviewer-report.verification-codex.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps({\"summary\": \"missing reviewer and findings\"}) + \"\\n\",\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    path = write_report(tmp_path, report)\n\n    result = load_evaluator()(tmp_path, path)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"reviewer_report_invalid:verification-codex\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_internal_reviewer_report_without_current_context_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    prepare_complete_evidence(tmp_path)\n    stale_report = {\n        \"reviewer\": {\n            \"id\": \"verification-codex\",\n            \"provider\": \"internal-agent\",\n            \"role\": \"verification\",\n            \"model\": \"codex\",\n        },\n        \"summary\": \"Old report with matching reviewer identity but no current packet context.\",\n        \"findings\": [],\n    }\n    (tmp_path / \"reviewer-report.verification-codex.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(stale_report, indent=2) + \"\\n\",\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    path = write_report(tmp_path, report)\n\n    result = load_evaluator()(tmp_path, path)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"reviewer_report_context_missing:verification-codex\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_internal_reviewer_report_wrong_run_context_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    prepare_complete_evidence(tmp_path)\n    stale_context = review_context(\"verification-codex\")\n    stale_context[\"run_id\"] = \"older-run\"\n    stale_report = {\n        \"reviewer\": {\n            \"id\": \"verification-codex\",\n            \"provider\": \"internal-agent\",\n            \"role\": \"verification\",\n            \"model\": \"codex\",\n        },\n        \"review_context\": stale_context,\n        \"summary\": \"Old report with matching packet path but wrong run.\",\n        \"findings\": [],\n    }\n    (tmp_path / \"reviewer-report.verification-codex.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(stale_report, indent=2) + \"\\n\",\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    path = write_report(tmp_path, report)\n\n    result = load_evaluator()(tmp_path, path)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"reviewer_report_context_mismatch:verification-codex\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_internal_reviewer_report_missing_reviewer_instance_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    prepare_complete_evidence(tmp_path)\n    incomplete_context = review_context(\"verification-codex\")\n    incomplete_context.pop(\"reviewer_instance_id\")\n    stale_report = {\n        \"reviewer\": {\n            \"id\": \"verification-codex\",\n            \"provider\": \"internal-agent\",\n            \"role\": \"verification\",\n            \"model\": \"codex\",\n        },\n        \"review_context\": incomplete_context,\n        \"summary\": \"Old report without the assigned reviewer instance in context.\",\n        \"findings\": [],\n    }\n    (tmp_path / \"reviewer-report.verification-codex.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(stale_report, indent=2) + \"\\n\",\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    path = write_report(tmp_path, report)\n\n    result = load_evaluator()(tmp_path, path)\n\n    assert result[\"state\"] == \"blocked_missing_evidence\"\n    assert result[\"accepted\"] is False\n    assert \"reviewer_report_context_mismatch:verification-codex\" in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_old_packet_and_matching_internal_report_pair_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = complete_report()\n    report[\"status\"] = \"rejected\"\n \"external_review_raw_output_hash_mismatch:verification-claude\" not in result[\"blockers\"]\n\n\ndef test_live_external_output_not_persisted_blocks_readiness(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    report = test_pr_merge_readiness_workflow_manifest_declares_utility_policy() -> None:\n    workflow_path = ROOT / \"workflows\" / \"pr-merge-readiness\" / \"workflow.yaml\"\n    workflow = yaml.safe_load(workflow_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n\n    assert workflow[\"name\"] == \"pr-merge-readiness\"\n    assert workflow[\"mvp_status\"] == \"v0.2-utility\"\n    assert workflow[\"default_strictness\"] == \"L3\"\n    assert \"project-initialization\" not in workflow.get(\"outputs\", [])\n    assert workflow[\"review\"][\"topology\"] == \"heterogeneous-variable\"\n    assert workflow[\"review\"][\"provider_strategy\"] == \"provider-mirrored-topic-pairs\"\n    topic_pairs = workflow[\"review\"][\"topic_pairs\"]\n    assert {item[\"topic\"] for item in topic_pairs} == {\n        \"verification-evidence\",\n        \"architecture-process\",\n        \"adversarial-authority\",\n    }\n    for pair in topic_pairs:\n        assert pair[\"providers\"] == [\"internal-agent\", \"claude-code\"]\n\n\ndef test_example_pr_merge_readiness_report_validates() -> None:\n    from repo_validation.pr_merge_readiness import validate_pr_merge_readiness_report\n\n    report_path = (\n        ROOT\n        / \"examples\"\n        / \"pr-merge-readiness\"\n        / \"complete\"\n        / \"pr-merge-readiness-report.json\"\n    )\n\n    errors = validate_pr_merge_readiness_report(ROOT, report_path)\n\n    assert errors == []\n"

      "path": "tests/test_scripts_smoke.py",
      "size_bytes": 324334,
      "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport os\nimport subprocess\nimport sys\nimport json\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\nFORBIDDEN_CLAUDE_ENV = [\n    \"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\",\n    \"ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN\",\n    \"ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL\",\n    \"CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK\",\n    \"CLAUDE_CODE_USE_VERTEX\",\n]\n\n\ndef clean_env() -> dict[str, str]:\n    env = os.environ.copy()\n    for name in FORBIDDEN_CLAUDE_ENV:\n        env.pop(name, None)\n    return env\n\n\ndef run(*args: str, env: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> subprocess.CompletedProcess[str]:\n    return subprocess.run(\n        [sys.executable, *args],\n        cwd=ROOT,\n        text=True,\n        capture_output=True,\n        env=env,\n    )\n\n\ndef reviewer_report_context(\n    reviewer: str,\n    packet_ref: object,\n    material_change_id: str | None = None,\n    run_id: str = \"2026-06-17-add-calculator\",\n) -> dict[str, str]:\n    context = {\n        \"run_id\": run_id,\n        \"review_packet_path\": str(packet_ref),\n        \"reviewer_instance_id\": reviewer,\n    }\n    if material_change_id:\n        context[\"material_change_id\"] = material_change_id\n    return context\n\n\ndef write_minimal_review_preparation(path: Path, contract_path: Path, root: Path | None = None) -> None:\n    import hashlib\n    import yaml\n\n    base = root.resolve() if root is not None else ROOT\n\n    def resolve_ref(ref: object) -> Path:\n        ref_path = Path(str(ref))\n        if ref_path.is_absolute():\n            return ref_path\n        return base / ref_path\n\n    def rel_or_abs(ref_path: Path) -> str:\n        if root is None:\n            return str(ref_path.resolve())\n        try:\n            return ref_path.resolve().relative_to(base).as_posix()\n        except ValueError:\n            return str(ref_path.resolve())\n\n    def sha(ref_path: Path) -> str:\n        return \"sha256:\" + hashlib.sha256(ref_path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()\n\n    contract = yaml.safe_load(contract_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    assignments = contract.get(\"reviewer_assignments\", []) or []\n    assignment_reviewers = [str(item.get(\"reviewer\")) for item in assignments if isinstance(item, dict)]\n    inputs = contract.setdefault(\"inputs\", {})\n    packet_entries = {\n        str(item.get(\"reviewer\")): item\n        for item in inputs.get(\"review_packets\", []) or []\n        if isinstance(item, dict) and item.get(\"reviewer\")\n    }\n    rendered_prompts = {\n        str(item.get(\"reviewer\")): item\n        for item in contract.get(\"rendered_prompts\", []) or []\n        if isinstance(item, dict) and item.get(\"reviewer\")\n    }\n    prompt_dir = contract_path.parent / \"review-prompts\"\n    prompt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    for reviewer in assignment_reviewers:\n        if reviewer not in rendered_prompts:\n            prompt_path = prompt_dir / f\"{reviewer}.md\"\n            prompt_path.write_text(f\"Review prompt for {reviewer}.\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n            prompt_ref = rel_or_abs(prompt_path)\n            rendered_prompts[reviewer] = {\n                \"reviewer\": reviewer,\n                \"prompt_path\": prompt_ref,\n            }\n    contract[\"rendered_prompts\"] = [rendered_prompts[reviewer] for reviewer in assignment_reviewers if reviewer in rendered_prompts]\n    for prompt in contract[\"rendered_prompts\"]:\n        prompt_path = resolve_ref(prompt[\"prompt_path\"])\n        prompt[\"prompt_hash\"] = sha(prompt_path)\n        prompt.setdefault(\"packet_hash\", \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64)\n        prompt.setdefault(\"schema_hash\", \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64)\n        prompt.setdefault(\"rubric_hash\", \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64)\n        prompt.setdefault(\"role_contract_hash\", \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64)\n    contract_path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(contract, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n    ref = str(contract_path.resolve())\n    if root is not None:\n        try:\n            ref = contract_path.resolve().relative_to(root.resolve()).as_posix()\n        except ValueError:\n            pass\n    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    contract_hash = sha(contract_path)\n    review_packets = []\n    for reviewer in assignment_reviewers:\n        packet_entry = packet_entries.get(reviewer)\n        packet_ref = packet_entry.get(\"path\") if packet_entry else next(\n            item.get(\"packet_path\") for item in assignments if item.get(\"reviewer\") == reviewer\n        )\n        packet_path = resolve_ref(packet_ref)\n        review_packets.append(\n            {\n                \"reviewer\": reviewer,\n                \"path\": str(packet_ref),\n                \"hash\": sha(packet_path),\n                **(\n                    {\"shared_packet_content_hash\": packet_entry[\"shared_packet_content_hash\"]}\n                    if packet_entry and packet_entry.get(\"shared_packet_content_hash\")\n                    else {}\n                ),\n            }\n        )\n    rendered_prompt_entries = []\n    for reviewer in assignment_reviewers:\n        prompt = rendered_prompts[reviewer]\n        prompt_path = resolve_ref(prompt[\"prompt_path\"])\n        rendered_prompt_entries.append(\n            {\n                \"reviewer\": reviewer,\n                \"path\": str(prompt[\"prompt_path\"]),\n                \"hash\": sha(prompt_path),\n                \"packet_hash\": prompt.get(\"packet_hash\", \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64),\n                \"schema_hash\": prompt.get(\"schema_hash\", \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64),\n                \"rubric_hash\": prompt.get(\"rubric_hash\", \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64),\n                \"role_contract_hash\": prompt.get(\"role_contract_hash\", \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64),\n            }\n        )\n    invocation_set_path = str(inputs.get(\"review_invocation_set\", \"review-invocation-set.json\"))\n    path.write_text(\n        json.dumps(\n            {\n                \"version\": 1,\n                \"artifact_kind\": \"review_artifact_preparation\",\n                \"artifact_scope\": \"run\",\n                \"status\": \"completed\",\n                \"review_prompt_contract\": {\n                    \"path\": ref,\n                    \"hash\": contract_hash,\n                },\n                \"source_context\": {\n                    \"dirty_policy\": \"fail-closed\",\n                    \"worktree\": {\n                        \"status_command\": \"git status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all\",\n                        \"status_entries\": [],\n                        \"included_dirty_paths\": [],\n                        \"excluded_dirty_paths\": [],\n                    },\n                },\n                \"input_artifacts\": [\n                    {\n                        \"path\": ref,\n                        \"kind\": \"review_prompt_contract\",\n                        \"hash\": contract_hash,\n                    }\n                ],\n                \"generated_artifacts\": {\n                    \"review_packets\": review_packets,\n                    \"rendered_prompts\": rendered_prompt_entries,\n                    \"review_invocation_set\": {\"path\": invocation_set_path, \"status\": \"predeclared\"},\n                },\n                \"reviewer_assignments\": assignments,\n                \"validation\": {\n                    \"schema\": \"schemas/review-artifact-preparation.schema.json\",\n                    \"deterministic_script\": \"scripts/reviewers/prepare_review_set_artifacts.py\",\n                    \"script_contract\": \"scripts/contracts/prepare_review_set_artifacts.yaml\",\n                },\n            },\n            indent=2,\n        )\n        + \"\\n\",\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n\n\ndef test_example_contract_lint_passes() -> None:\n    result = run(\"scripts/contract_lint.py\", \"--contract\", \"examples/memory-policy/Docs/contracts/memory-policy.contract.md\")\n    assert result.returncode == 0, result.stdout + result.stderr\n\n\ndef test_example_gherkin_lint_passes() -> None:\n    result = run(\"scripts/gherkin_lint.py\", \"--contract\", \"examples/memory-policy/Docs/contracts/memory-policy.contract.md\")\n    assert result.returncode == 0, result.stdout + result.stderr\n\n\ndef test_example_boundary_check_passes() -> None:\n    result = run(\n        \"scripts/boundary_check.py\",\n        \"--contract\", \"examples/memory-policy/Docs/contracts/memory-policy.contract.md\",\n        \"--changed-files\", \"examples/memory-policy/changed-files.txt\",\n    )\n    assert result.returncode == 0, result.stdout + result.stderr\n\n\ndef test_gate_runner_manifest_dry_run(tmp_path):\n    import subprocess, sys\n    from pathlib import Path\n    root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n    out = tmp_path / \"gate-report.json\"\n    result = subprocess.run(\n        [sys.executable, str(root / \"scripts\" / \"gates\" / \"run_gate.py\"), \"--gate\", str(root / \"gates\" / \"contract_gate.yaml\"), \"--output\", str(out), \"--dry-run\"],\n        cwd=root,\n        text=True,\n        capture_output=True,\n    )\n    assert result.returncode == 0, result.stderr + result.stdout\n    assert out.exists()\n\ndef \"examples/memory-policy/Docs/contracts/memory-policy.bindings.yaml\").read_text(\n            encoding=\"utf-8\"\n        )\n    )\n    jsonschema.Draft202012Validator(schema).validate(example)\n\n    invalid = {\n        \"version\": 1,\n        \"contract\": \"task.contract.md\",\n        \"bindings\": [\n            {\n                \"id\": \"REQ-MISSING-CHECK\",\n copy.deepcopy(workflow)\n    without_acceptance[\"phases\"] = [\n        phase\n        for phase in without_acceptance[\"phases\"]\n        if phase.get(\"id\") != \"contract_acceptance\"\n    ]\n    errors = validate_big_feature_plan_gate_policy(workflow_path, without_acceptance)\n    assert any(\"contract_acceptance\" in error for error in errors)\n\n    without_red_dependency = copy.deepcopy(workflow)\n    for phase in without_red_dependency[\"phases\"]:\n        if phase.get(\"id\") == \"red_capture\":\n            phase[\"runs_after\"] = [\"plan_gate\"]\n    errors = validate_big_feature_plan_gate_policy(workflow_path, without_red_dependency)\n    assert any(\"red_capture phase must run after contract_acceptance\" in error for error in errors)\n\n    without_design_review = copy.deepcopy(workflow)\n    for phase in without_design_review[\"phases\"]:\n        if phase.get(\"id\") == \"contract_acceptance\":\n            phase.pop(\"decision_review_contract\", None)\n    errors = validate_big_feature_plan_gate_policy(workflow_path, without_design_review)\n    assert any(\"contract_acceptance must declare decision_review_contract\" in error for error in errors)\n\n    without_pause_phase = copy.deepcopy(workflow)\n    allowed_pause_phases = without_pause_phase[\"human_interaction\"][\"allowed_pause_phases\"]\n    allowed_pause_phases.remove(\"contract_acceptance\")\n    errors = validate_big_feature_plan_gate_policy(workflow_path, without_pause_phase)\n    assert any(\"human_interaction.allowed_pause_phases must include contract_acceptance\" in error for error in errors)\n\n\ndef test_review_fusion_reusable_pipeline_is_documented() -> None:\n    review_model = (ROOT / \"docs/review-fusion-model.md\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    fusion_skill = (ROOT / \"skills/fusion-synthesis/SKILL.md\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    fusion_template = (ROOT / \"templates/fusion-report.md\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    validation_template = (ROOT / \"templates/finding-validation-report.md\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    combined = \"\\n\".join(\n        [review_model, fusion_skill, fusion_template, validation_template]\n    ).lower()\n\n    required_terms = [\n        \"mechanical intake\",\n        \"canonical finding\",\n        \"duplicate\",\n        \"related\",\n        \"conflict\",\n        \"topic-pair comparison\",\n        \"authority boundary\",\n        \"human-mediated\",\n    ]\n    for term in required_terms:\n        assert term in combined\n\n\ndef test_project_binding_rejects_path_escape(tmp_path) -> None:\n    import shutil\n    import yaml\n\n    project = tmp_path / \"project\"\n    shutil.copytree(ROOT / \"examples/project-overlay/.agentsflow\", project / \".agentsflow\")\n    binding_path = project / \".agentsflow/workflows/big-feature-contract-first.binding.yaml\"\n    binding = yaml.safe_load(binding_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    binding[\"gates\"][\"verification_gate\"][\"runner\"] = \"../outside.sh\"\n    binding_path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(binding, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n    result = run(\"scripts/validate_project_binding.py\", \"--project\", str(project), \"--agentsflow-root\", \".\")\n    assert result.returncode != 0\n    assert \"relative non-escaping path\" in (result.stdout + result.stderr)\n\n\n\ndef test_project_intake_validation_passes() -> None:\n    result = run(\"scripts/validate_project_intake.py\", \"--intake\", \"examples/project-initialization/project-intake.yaml\")\n    assert result.returncode == 0, result.stdout + result.stderr\n\n\ndef test_project_intake_prepare_workflow_requires_target_workflow(tmp_path) -> None:\n    import yaml\n\n    intake = yaml.safe_load((ROOT / / \"project-intake.yaml\"\n    path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(intake, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n    result = run(\"scripts/validate_project_intake.py\", \"--intake\", str(path))\n    assert result.returncode != 0\n    assert \"target_workflow must be a non-empty string\" in (result.stdout + result.stderr)\n\n    intake[\"target_workflow\"] = 123\n    path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(intake, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    result = run(\"scripts/validate_project_intake.py\", \"--intake\", str(path))\n    assert result.returncode != 0\n    assert \"target_workflow must be a non-empty string\" in (result.stdout + result.stderr)\n\n    intake[\"target_workflow\"] = \"not-a-real-workflow\"\n    path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(intake, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    result = run(\"scripts/validate_project_intake.py\", \"--intake\", str(path))\n    assert result.returncode != 0\n    assert \"target_workflow must match a v0.2 supported target workflow id\" in (result.stdout + result.stderr)\n\n    intake[\"target_workflow\"] = \"safe-refactor\"\n    path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(intake, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    result = run(\"scripts/validate_project_intake.py\", \"--intake\", str(path))\n    assert result.returncode != 0\n    assert \"target_workflow must match a v0.2 supported target workflow id\" in (result.stdout + result.stderr)\n\n    intake[\"target_workflow\"] = \"project-initialization\"\n    path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(intake, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    result = run(\"scripts/validate_project_intake.py\", \"--intake\", str(path))\n    assert result.returncode != 0\n    assert \"target_workflow must match a v0.2 supported target workflow id\" in (result.stdout + result.stderr)\n\n    for target_workflow in [\"bugfix-regression-capture\", \"new-project-spec-first\", \"review-only-fusion\"]:\n        intake[\"target_workflow\"] = target_workflow\n        path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(intake, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n        result = run(\"scripts/validate_project_intake.py\", \"--intake\", str(path))\n        assert result.returncode != 0\n        assert \"target_workflow must match a v0.2 supported target workflow id\" in (\n            result.stdout + result.stderr\n        )\n\n    intake[\"target_workflow\"] = \"big-feature-contract-first\"\n    path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(intake, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    result = run(\"scripts/validate_project_intake.py\", \"--intake\", str(path))\n    assert result.returncode == 0, result.stdout + result.stderr\n\n\ndef test_project_intake_schema_restricts_prepare_workflow_target() -> None:\n    import copy\n    import json\n\n    import jsonschema\n    import yaml\n\n    schema = json.loads((ROOT / \"schemas/project-intake.schema.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    validator = jsonschema.Draft202012Validator(schema)\n    intake = yaml.safe_load((ROOT / \"examples/project-initialization/project-intake.yaml\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    intake[\"intent_mode\"] = \"prepare-workflow\"\n\n    valid = copy.deepcopy(intake)\n    valid[\"target_workflow\"] = \"big-feature-contract-first\"\n    validator.validate(valid)\n\n    for target_workflow in [\n        \"bugfix-regression-capture\",\n        \"new-project-spec-first\",\n        \"review-only-fusion\",\n        \"safe-refactor\",\n        \"project-initialization\",\n        \"not-a-real-workflow\",\n    ]:\n        invalid = copy.deepcopy(intake)\n        invalid[\"target_workflow\"] = target_workflow\n        assert list(validator.iter_errors(invalid))\n\n\ndef test_project_inventory_validation_passes() -> None:\n    result = run(\"scripts/validate_project_inventory.py\", \"--inventory\", \"examples/project-initialization/project-inventory.json\")\n    assert result.returncode == 0, result.stdout + result.stderr\n\n\ndef test_project_assessment_schema_requires_triad_synthesis() -> None:\n    import copy\n    import json\n\n    import jsonschema\n\n    schema = json.loads((ROOT / \"templates/project-operating-decisions.yaml\",\n        \"examples/project-initialization/project-operating-decisions.yaml\",\n    ]:\n        data = yaml.safe_load((ROOT / rel).read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n        validator.validate(data)\n        material_triggers = set(\n            data[\"review_cycle_policy\"][\"materiality_classification\"][\"material_if_changes\"]\n        )\n        assert {\n            \"task_contract_or_scope\",\n            \"selected_risk_surfaces_or_failure_path_matrix\",\n            \"behavior_bindings\",\n            \"affected_implementation_behavior\",\n            \"review_packet_content\",\n        }.issubset(material_triggers)\n\n    invalid_cycles = yaml.safe_load((ROOT / \"templates/project-operating-decisions.yaml\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    invalid_cycles[\"review_cycle_policy\"][\"max_review_cycles\"] = 1\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(invalid_cycles))\n\n    invalid_control_count = yaml.safe_load((ROOT / \"templates/project-operating-decisions.yaml\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    invalid_control_count[\"review_cycle_policy\"][\"control_reviewer_count\"] = 1\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(invalid_control_count))\n\n    invalid_context = yaml.safe_load((ROOT / \"templates/project-operating-decisions.yaml\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    invalid_context[\"review_cycle_policy\"][\"control_review_context_policy\"][\"allowed_context_sources\"].append(\"full_repo\")\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(invalid_context))\n\n \"templates/project-operating-decisions.yaml\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    missing_material_trigger[\"review_cycle_policy\"][\"materiality_classification\"][\"material_if_changes\"].remove(\n \"templates/project-operating-decisions.yaml\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    missing_risk_surface_policy.pop(\"risk_surface_policy\")\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(missing_risk_surface_policy))\n\n    missing_evidence_freshness = yaml.safe_load((ROOT / \"templates/project-operating-decisions.yaml\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    missing_evidence_freshness[\"artifact_policy\"].pop(\"evidence_freshness\")\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(missing_evidence_freshness))\n\n    read_write_review = yaml.safe_load((ROOT / \"templates/project-operating-decisions.yaml\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    read_write_review[\"review_policy\"][\"read_only_by_default\"] = False\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(read_write_review))\n\n    missing_main_validation = yaml.safe_load((ROOT / \"templates/project-operating-decisions.yaml\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n \"examples/project-initialization/project-knowledge-extraction.md\"\n    ).read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    disposition_path = tmp_path / \"project-documentation-disposition.yaml\"\n    decisions_path = tmp_path / \"human-decisions.yaml\"\n    questions_path = tmp_path / \"human-questions.yaml\"\n    extraction_path = tmp_path / \"project-knowledge-extraction.md\"\n\n    def disposition_path.write_text(\n            yaml.safe_dump(disposition_data or disposition), encoding=\"utf-8\"\n        )\n        decisions_path.write_text(\n            yaml.safe_dump(decisions_data or decisions), encoding=\"utf-8\"\n        )\n        questions_path.write_text(\n            yaml.safe_dump(questions_data or questions), encoding=\"utf-8\"\n        )\n        extraction_path.write_text(extraction_text, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n    write_artifacts()\n    assert not validate_repo.validate_project_documentation_disposition_artifact(\n        ROOT, disposition_path\n    )\n\n    copied_template_disposition = yaml.safe_load(yaml.safe_dump(disposition))\n    copied_template_disposition[\"artifact_role\"] = \"template\"\n    write_artifacts(disposition_data=copied_template_disposition)\n    errors = validate_repo.validate_project_documentation_disposition_artifact(\n        ROOT, disposition_path\n    )\n    assert disposition_path\n    )\n    assert \"missing human-questions.yaml\" in \"\\n\".join(errors)\n\n    missing_question = yaml.safe_load(yaml.safe_dump(questions))\n    missing_question[\"questions\"] = [\n        question\n        for question in missing_question[\"questions\"]\n        if question[\"decision_id\"] != \"documentation-legacy-adoption\"\n    ]\n decision[\"decision_id\"] == \"unrelated-confirmed-decision\"\n    )\n    nonblocking_risk_decision[\"answer\"] = {\n        \"accepts_light_extraction_implementation_risk\": True,\n    }\n validate_repo.validate_project_documentation_disposition_artifact(\n        ROOT, disposition_path\n    )\n    assert \"implementation_risk_acceptance decision_record must be blocking-material\" in disposition_data=risk_disposition)\n    assert not validate_repo.validate_project_documentation_disposition_artifact(\n        ROOT, disposition_path\n    )\n\n\ndef test_project_initialization_example_claimed_files_exist() -> None:\n    import json\n    import yaml\n\n    example_root = ROOT / \"examples/project-initialization\"\n    raw_scan = json.loads((example_root / \"project-raw-scan.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    for rel in raw_scan[\"observed_files\"]:\n        assert (example_root / rel).exists(), rel\n\n    disposition = yaml.safe_load(\n        (example_root / \"project-documentation-disposition.yaml\").read_text(\n            encoding=\"utf-8\"\n        )\n    )\n    for document in disposition[\"documents\"]:\n        assert (example_root / document[\"path\"]).exists(), document[\"path\"]\n        for evidence in document[\"evidence\"]:\n            assert (example_root / evidence).exists(), evidence\n\n    decision_record = disposition[\"documentation_legacy_adoption\"][\"decision_record\"]\n    decision_file, decision_id = decision_record.split(\"#\", 1)\n    human_decisions = yaml.safe_load(\n        (example_root / decision_file).read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    )\n    human_questions = yaml.safe_load(\n        (example_root / \"human-questions.yaml\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    )\n    questions_by_id = {\n        question[\"decision_id\"]: question\n        for question in human_questions[\"questions\"]\n    }\n    decisions_by_id = {\n        decision[\"decision_id\"]: decision\n        for decision in human_decisions[\"decisions\"]\n    }\n    documentation_question = questions_by_id[decision_id]\n    assert documentation_question[\"phase_id\"] == \"documentation_disposition_decision\"\n    assert documentation_question[\"classification\"] == \"blocking-material\"\n    assert documentation_question[\"default\"][\"allowed\"] is False\n    assert \"id\" not in documentation_question[\"default\"]\n    documentation_decision = decisions_by_id[decision_id]\n    assert documentation_decision[\"phase_id\"] == \"documentation_disposition_decision\"\n    assert documentation_decision[\"status\"] == \"confirmed\"\n    assert documentation_decision[\"answered_by\"] in {\"human\", \"project-owner\"}\n    assert documentation_decision[\"answer\"][\"mode\"] == disposition[\n        \"documentation_legacy_adoption\"\n    ][\"mode\"]\n    assert documentation_decision[\"answer\"][\"extraction_depth\"] == disposition[\n        \"documentation_legacy_adoption\"\n    ][\"extraction_depth\"]\n\n\ndef test_human_interaction_artifact_schemas_pass() -> None:\n    import json\n\n    import jsonschema\n    import yaml\n\n    cases = [\n        (\n            \"schemas/human-questions.schema.json\",\n            [\n                \"templates/human-questions.yaml\",\n                \"examples/project-initialization/human-questions.yaml\",\n            ],\n        ),\n        (\n            \"schemas/human-decisions.schema.json\",\n            [\n                \"templates/human-decisions.yaml\",\n                \"examples/project-initialization/human-decisions.yaml\",\n            ],\n        ),\n    ]\n    for schema_rel, artifact_rels in cases:\n        schema = json.loads((ROOT / schema_rel).read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n        validator = jsonschema.Draft202012Validator(schema)\n        for rel in artifact_rels:\n            data = yaml.safe_load((ROOT / rel).read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n            validator.validate(data)\n\n\ndef test_human_questions_require_classification_and_blocking_questions_cannot_auto_default() -> None:\n    import copy\n    import json\n\n    import jsonschema\n    import yaml\n\n    schema = json.loads((ROOT / \"schemas/human-questions.schema.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n deferred decision is out of scope for this run.\"],\n    }\n    assert not list(validator.iter_errors(deferred_blocking))\n\n    missing_constraints = copy.deepcopy(deferred_blocking)\n empty_constraints[\"decisions\"][0][\"deferral_constraints\"][\"constraints\"] = []\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(empty_constraints))\n\n    blank_constraints = copy.deepcopy(deferred_blocking)\n    blank_constraints[\"decisions\"][0][\"deferral_constraints\"][\"constraints\"] = [\"   \"]\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(blank_constraints))\n\n\ndef copy.deepcopy(valid)\n    invalid_count[\"collision_control\"][\"control_reviewer_count\"] = 1\n    assert list(jsonschema.Draft202012Validator(schema).iter_errors(invalid_count))\n\n    empty_batch = list(validator.iter_errors(root_decision))\n\n    nested_decision = copy.deepcopy(report)\n    nested_decision[\"evidence_collected\"][0][\"finding_decision\"] = \"accepted\"\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(nested_decision))\n\n    missing_context_sources = copy.deepcopy(report)\n    missing_context_sources[\"context_policy\"].pop(\"allowed_context_sources\")\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(missing_context_sources))\n\n    human_source = copy.deepcopy(report)\n    human_source[\"allowed_instruments\"][0][\"source\"] = \"human_decision\"\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(human_source))\n\n    empty_allowed_id = copy.deepcopy(report)\n    empty_allowed_id[\"allowed_instruments\"][0][\"id\"] = \"\"\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(empty_allowed_id))\n\n    empty_command_id = copy.deepcopy(report)\n    empty_command_id[\"commands_run\"][0][\"instrument_id\"] = \"\"\n    assert list(validator.iter_errors(empty_command_id))\n\n    undeclared_command = copy.deepcopy(report)\n    undeclared_command[\"commands_run\"][0][\"instrument_id\"] = \"not-declared\"\n    temp_report = ROOT / \".pytest_cache/evidence-probe-report.invalid.json\"\n    temp_report.write_text(json.dumps(undeclared_command), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    try:\n        errors = validate_repo.validate_evidence_probe_report_artifact(ROOT, temp_report)\n    finally:\n        temp_report.unlink(missing_ok=True)\n    assert errors\n    assert \"not declared in test_review_prompt_contract_rejects_run_artifact_drift(tmp_path) -> None:\n    import copy\n    import hashlib\n    import json\n    import shutil\n    import sys\n\n    import yaml\n\n    sys.path.insert(0, str(ROOT / \"scripts\"))\n    import validate_repo  # noqa: PLC0415\n\n    path = (\n        ROOT\n        / \"examples/e2e/minimal-python-project/Docs/agentsflow/runs/2026-06-17-add-calculator/review-prompt-contract.yaml\"\n    )\n    contract = yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    broken = copy.deepcopy(contract)\n    broken[\"rendered_prompts\"][0][\"shared_packet_content_hash\"] = \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64\n\n    errors = validate_repo.validate_review_prompt_contract_invariants(ROOT, path, broken, True)\n    assert errors\n    assert \"shared_packet_content_hash\" in \"\\n\".join(errors)\n\n    stale_shared_content = copy.deepcopy(contract)\n    stale_shared_content[\"inputs\"][\"review_packets\"][0][\"shared_packet_content_hash\"] = \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64\n    stale_shared_content[\"inputs\"][\"review_packets\"][1][\"shared_packet_content_hash\"] = \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64\n    stale_shared_content[\"rendered_prompts\"][0][\"shared_packet_content_hash\"] = \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64\n    stale_shared_content[\"rendered_prompts\"][1][\"shared_packet_content_hash\"] = \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64\n    errors = validate_repo.validate_review_prompt_contract_run_references(ROOT, path, stale_shared_content)\n    assert errors\n    assert \"shared_packet_content_hash\" in \"\\n\".join(errors)\n\n    prompt_root = tmp_path / \"agentsflow-rendered-prompt-drift\"\n    shutil.copytree(ROOT, prompt_root, ignore=shutil.ignore_patterns(\".git\", \".venv\", \".pytest_cache\", \"__pycache__\"))\n sibling shared-content.json\" in \"\\n\".join(errors)\n\n\ndef test_review_prompt_contract_allows_provider_as_shared_packet_envelope_field(tmp_path) -> None:\n    import hashlib\n    import json\n    import shutil\n    import sys\n\n    import yaml\n\n    sys.path.insert(0, str(ROOT / \"scripts\"))\n    import validate_repo  # noqa: PLC0415\n    from repo_validation.review import _render_expected_review_prompt  # noqa: PLC0415\n\n    root = tmp_path / \"agentsflow-mixed-provider-shared-packet\"\n    shutil.copytree(ROOT, root, ignore=shutil.ignore_patterns(\".git\", \".venv\", \".pytest_cache\", \"__pycache__\"))\n    run_dir = root / \"examples/e2e/minimal-python-project/Docs/agentsflow/runs/2026-06-17-add-calculator\"\n    contract_path = run_dir / \"review-prompt-contract.yaml\"\n    contract = yaml.safe_load(contract_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    packet_dir = run_dir / \"review-packets\"\n    shared_content_path = packet_dir / \"shared-content.json\"\n    shared_content = json.loads(shared_content_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    shared_content[\"excluded_envelope_fields\"] = [\"reviewer_instance_id\", \"provider\"]\n    shared_content_path.write_text(json.dumps(shared_content, indent=2) + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    shared_content_hash = \"sha256:\" + hashlib.sha256(shared_content_path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()\n\n    role_path = root / \"profiles/reviewer_roles/generalist.yaml\"\n    role_data = yaml.safe_load(role_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    packet_providers = {\n        \"generalist-a\": \"internal-agent\",\n        \"generalist-b\": \"claude-code\",\n    }\n    packet_hashes: dict[str, str] = {}\n    for reviewer, provider in packet_providers.items():\n        packet_path = packet_dir / f\"{reviewer}.json\"\n        packet = json.loads(packet_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n        packet[\"provider\"] = provider\n        packet_path.write_text(json.dumps(packet, indent=2) + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n        packet_hashes[reviewer] = \"sha256:\" + hashlib.sha256(packet_path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()\n\n        prompt_path = run_dir / \"review-prompts\" / f\"{reviewer}.md\"\n        prompt_path.write_text(_render_expected_review_prompt(packet, role_data), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n        prompt_hash = \"sha256:\" + hashlib.sha256(prompt_path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()\n        for rendered in contract[\"rendered_prompts\"]:\n            if rendered[\"reviewer\"] == reviewer:\n                rendered[\"prompt_hash\"] = prompt_hash\n                rendered[\"packet_hash\"] = packet_hashes[reviewer]\n                rendered[\"shared_packet_content_hash\"] = shared_content_hash\n\n    for packet_ref in contract[\"inputs\"][\"review_packets\"]:\n        reviewer = packet_ref[\"reviewer\"]\n        packet_ref[\"packet_hash\"] = packet_hashes[reviewer]\n        packet_ref[\"shared_packet_content_hash\"] = shared_content_hash\n    contract_path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(contract, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n    errors = validate_repo.validate_review_prompt_contract_run_references(root, contract_path, contract)\n    assert not errors\n\n\ndef test_review_prompt_contract_rejects_missing_run_references() -> None:\n    import copy\n    import sys\n\n    import yaml\n\n    sys.path.insert(0, str(ROOT / assert \"operating_decisions_interview must apply only to adoption-onboarding\" in \"\\n\".join(errors)\n\n    broken_legacy_discovery_scope = copy.deepcopy(workflow)\n    for phase in
