\"reviewer\": \"generalist-b\",\n            \"provider\": \"internal-agent\",\n            \"model_family\": \"codex\",\n            \"packet_path\": contract[\"inputs\"][\"review_packets\"][1][\"path\"],\n            \"report_path\": str(run_rel / \"reviewer-report.generalist-b.json\"),\n        },\n    ]\n    for reviewer in [\"generalist-a\", \"generalist-b\"]:\n        (root / run_rel / f\"reviewer-report.{reviewer}.json\").write_text(\n            json.dumps(\n                {\n                    \"reviewer\": {\n                        \"id\": reviewer,\n                        \"provider\": \"internal-agent\",\n                        \"role\": \"generalist\",\n                        \"model\": \"codex\",\n                    },\n                    \"review_context\": reviewer_report_context(\n                        reviewer,\n                        contract[\"inputs\"][\"review_packets\"][0 if reviewer == \"generalist-a\" else 1][\"path\"],\n                    ),\n                    \"summary\": \"Internal reviewer artifact.\",\n                    \"findings\": [],\n                },\n                indent=2,\n            ),\n            encoding=\"utf-8\",\n        )\n    contract_path.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(contract, sort_keys=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    contract_hash = validate_repo.sha256_file(contract_path)\n\n    packets = []\n    for packet in contract[\"inputs\"][\"review_packets\"]:\n        packet_path = root / packet[\"path\"]\n        packets.append(\n            {\n                \"reviewer\": packet[\"reviewer\"],\n                \"path\": packet[\"path\"],\n                \"hash\": validate_repo.sha256_file(packet_path),\n                \"shared_packet_content_hash\": packet[\"shared_packet_content_hash\"],\n            }\n        )\n    prompts = []\n    for prompt in contract[\"rendered_prompts\"]:\n        prompts.append(\n            {\n                \"reviewer\": prompt[\"reviewer\"],\n                \"path\": prompt[\"prompt_path\"],\n                \"hash\": validate_repo.sha256_file(root / prompt[\"prompt_path\"]),\n                \"packet_hash\": prompt[\"packet_hash\"],\n                \"schema_hash\": prompt[\"schema_hash\"],\n                \"rubric_hash\": prompt[\"rubric_hash\"],\n                \"role_contract_hash\": prompt[\"role_contract_hash\"],\n            }\n        )\n    preparation = {\n        \"version\": 1,\n        \"artifact_kind\": \"review_artifact_preparation\",\n        \"artifact_scope\": \"run\",\n        \"status\": \"completed\",\n        \"review_prompt_contract\": {\n            \"path\": str(run_rel / \"review-prompt-contract.yaml\"),\n            \"hash\": contract_hash,\n        },\n        \"source_context\": {\n            \"dirty_policy\": \"fail-closed\",\n            \"worktree\": {\n                \"status_command\": \"git status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all\",\n                \"status_entries\": [],\n                \"included_dirty_paths\": [],\n                \"excluded_dirty_paths\": [],\n            },\n        },\n        \"input_artifacts\": [\n            {\n                \"path\": contract[\"inputs\"][\"task_contract\"],\n                \"kind\": \"task_contract\",\n                \"hash\": validate_repo.sha256_file(root / contract[\"inputs\"][\"task_contract\"]),\n            }\n        ],\n        \"generated_artifacts\": {\n            \"shared_packet_content\": {\n                \"path\": str(run_rel / \"review-packets/shared-content.json\"),\n                \"hash\": validate_repo.sha256_file(root / run_rel / \"review-packets/shared-content.json\"),\n            },\n            \"review_packets\": packets,\n            \"rendered_prompts\": prompts,\n            \"review_invocation_set\": {\n                \"path\": str(invocation_set_path),\n                \"status\": \"completed\",\n            },\n        },\n        \"reviewer_assignments\": contract[\"reviewer_assignments\"],\n        \"validation\": {\n            \"schema\": \"schemas/review-artifact-preparation.schema.json\",\n            \"deterministic_script\": \"scripts/reviewers/prepare_review_set_artifacts.py\",\n            \"script_contract\": \"scripts/contracts/prepare_review_set_artifacts.yaml\",\n        },\n    }\n    (root / preparation_path).write_text(json.dumps(preparation, indent=2), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    preparation_hash = validate_repo.sha256_file(root / preparation_path)\n    (root / invocation_set_path).write_text(\n        json.dumps(\n            {\n                \"artifact_kind\": \"review_invocation_set\",\n                \"review_prompt_contract\": str(run_rel / \"review-prompt-contract.yaml\"),\n                \"artifact_preparation_report\": str(preparation_path),\n                \"artifact_preparation_report_hash\": preparation_hash,\n                \"status\": \"completed\",\n                \"provider_model_families\": [\"internal-agent/codex\"],\n                \"reviewers\": [\n                    {\n                        \"reviewer\": \"generalist-a\",\n                        \"provider\": \"internal-agent\",\n                        \"model_family\": \"codex\",\n                        \"packet_path\": contract[\"inputs\"][\"review_packets\"][0][\"path\"],\n                        \"report_path\": str(run_rel / \"reviewer-report.generalist-a.json\"),\n                        \"status\": \"report-present\",\n                    },\n                    {\n                        \"reviewer\": \"generalist-b\",\n                        \"provider\": \"internal-agent\",\n                        \"model_family\": \"codex\",\n                        \"packet_path\": contract[\"inputs\"][\"review_packets\"][1][\"path\"],\n                        \"report_path\": str(run_rel / \"reviewer-report.generalist-b.json\"),\n                        \"status\": \"report-present\",\n                    },\n                ],\n            },\n            indent=2,\n        ),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n\n    errors = validate_repo.validate_review_prompt_contract_run_references(root, contract_path, contract)\n    assert not errors\n\n    stale = copy.deepcopy(preparation)\n    stale[\"generated_artifacts\"][\"review_packets\"][0][\"hash\"] = \"sha256:\" + \"0\" * 64\n    (root / preparation_path).write_text(json.dumps(stale, indent=2), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    errors = validate_repo.validate_review_prompt_contract_run_references(root, contract_path, contract)\n    assert \"review_artifact_preparation review packet hash\" in \"\\n\".join(errors)\n\n\ndef _write_minimal_preparation_fixture(root: Path) -> tuple[Path, Path, Path, Path]:\n    import json\n    import shutil\n\n    import yaml\n\n    for rel in [\"schemas\", \"profiles\", \"templates/review-prompts\"]:\n        shutil.copytree(ROOT / rel, root / rel)\n    run_dir = root / \"Docs/agentsflow/runs/2026-06-21-prep\"\n    (run_dir / \"review-packets\").mkdir(parents=True)\n    (run_dir / \"review-prompts\").mkdir()\n    (run_dir / \"reports\").mkdir()\n    (root / \"src\").mkdir()\n    (root / \"AGENTS.md\").write_text(\"# Test Instructions\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    (run_dir / \"task.contract.md\").write_text(\"# Task Contract\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    (run_dir / \"verification-gate-report.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(\n            {\n                \"kind\": \"verification_gate_report\",\n                \"result_state\": \"pass\",\n                \"checks\": [{\"id\": \"pytest\", \"status\": \"pass\"}],\n            },\n subprocess.run([\"git\", \"commit\", \"-m\", \"initial\"], cwd=root, text=True, capture_output=True, check=True)\n\n\ndef test_prepare_review_set_artifacts_rejects_uncovered_dirty_paths(tmp_path) -> None:\n    root = tmp_path / \"root\"\n    root.mkdir()\n    contract_path, shared_packet_path, preparation_path, run_dir = _write_minimal_preparation_fixture(root)\n    _git_commit_all(root)\n str(root),\n        \"--contract\",\n        str(contract_path.relative_to(root)),\n        \"--shared-packet\",\n        str(shared_packet_path.relative_to(root)),\n        \"--preparation-output\",\n        str(preparation_path.relative_to(root)),\n        env=clean_env(),\n    )\n\n    assert result.returncode != 0\n    assert \"uncovered dirty worktree path\" in (result.stdout + result.stderr)\n    assert not (run_dir / \"review-packets/generalist-a.json\").exists()\n\n\ndef test_prepare_review_set_artifacts_rejects_stale_embedded_file_snapshot(tmp_path) -> None:\n    import json\n\n    root = tmp_path / \"root\"\n    root.mkdir()\n    contract_path, shared_packet_path, preparation_path, run_dir = _write_minimal_preparation_fixture(root)\n     \"content\": \"stale\",\n        }\n    ]\n    shared_packet_path.write_text(json.dumps(shared_packet, indent=2) + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n    _git_commit_all(root)\n    (root / \"src/new.py\").write_text(\"print('new')\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n    result = run(\n        \"scripts/reviewers/prepare_review_set_artifacts.py\",\n        \"--root\",\n        str(root),\n        \"--contract\",\n        str(contract_path.relative_to(root)),\n        \"--shared-packet\",\n        str(shared_packet_path.relative_to(root)),\n        \"--preparation-output\",\n        str(preparation_path.relative_to(root)),\n        \"--include\",\n        \"src/new.py\",\n        \"--include\",\n        \"AGENTS.md\",\n        env=clean_env(),\n    )\n\n    assert result.returncode != 0\n    assert \"embedded file snapshot is stale for AGENTS.md\" in (result.stdout + result.stderr)\n    assert not (run_dir / \"review-packets/generalist-a.json\").exists()\n\n\ndef test_prepare_review_set_artifacts_generates_packets_prompts_and_evidence(tmp_path) -> None:\n    import json\n\n    import jsonschema\n    import yaml\n\n    root = tmp_path / \"root\"\n    root.mkdir()\n    contract_path, shared_packet_path, preparation_path, run_dir = _write_minimal_preparation_fixture(root)\n    _git_commit_all(root)\n    (root / \"src/new.py\").write_text(\"print('new')\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n    result = run(\n        \"scripts/reviewers/prepare_review_set_artifacts.py\",\n        \"--root\",\n        str(root),\n        \"--contract\",\n        str(contract_path.relative_to(root)),\n        \"--shared-packet\",\n        str(shared_packet_path.relative_to(root)),\n        \"--preparation-output\",\n        str(preparation_path.relative_to(root)),\n        \"--include\",\n        \"src/new.py\",\n        \"--include\",\n        \"AGENTS.md\",\n        env=clean_env(),\n    )\n\n    assert result.returncode == 0, result.stdout + result.stderr\n    assert (run_dir / \"review-packets/generalist-a.json\").exists()\n    assert (run_dir / \"review-packets/generalist-b.json\").exists()\n    assert (run_dir / \"review-prompts/generalist-a.md\").exists()\n    assert (run_dir / \"review-prompts/generalist-b.md\").exists()\n    assert preparation_path.exists()\n    invocation_set_path = run_dir / \"review-invocation-set.json\"\n    assert invocation_set_path.exists()\n\n    preparation = json.loads(preparation_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    schema = json.loads((ROOT / \"schemas/review-artifact-preparation.schema.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    jsonschema.Draft202012Validator(schema).validate(preparation)\n    assert preparation[\"artifact_kind\"] == \"review_artifact_preparation\"\n    assert preparation[\"generated_artifacts\"][\"review_invocation_set\"][\"path\"].endswith(\"review-invocation-set.json\")\n    assert {item[\"path\"] for item in preparation[\"input_artifacts\"]} >= {\"src/new.py\", \"AGENTS.md\"}\n    invocation_set = json.loads(invocation_set_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    invocation_schema = json.loads((ROOT / \"schemas/review-invocation-set.schema.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    jsonschema.Draft202012Validator(invocation_schema).validate(invocation_set)\n    assert invocation_set[\"status\"] == \"predeclared\"\n    assert sorted(item[\"reviewer\"] for item in invocation_set[\"reviewers\"]) == [\n        \"generalist-a\",\n        \"generalist-b\",\n    ]\n\n    updated_contract = yaml.safe_load(contract_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    assert updated_contract[\"inputs\"][\"artifact_preparation_report\"].endswith(\"prepared-review-artifacts.json\")\n    assert updated_contract[\"inputs\"][\"review_invocation_set\"].endswith(\"review-invocation-set.json\")\n    assert updated_contract[\"inputs\"][\"evidence_report\"].endswith(\"evidence-report.md\")\n    for packet in updated_contract[\"inputs\"][\"review_packets\"]:\n        assert packet[\"packet_hash\"].startswith(\"sha256:\")\n    for prompt in updated_contract[\"rendered_prompts\"]:\n        assert prompt[\"prompt_hash\"].startswith(\"sha256:\")\n    packet_schema = json.loads((ROOT / \"schemas/review-packet.schema.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    packet_validator = jsonschema.Draft202012Validator(packet_schema)\n    for packet_path in [\n        run_dir / \"review-packets/generalist-a.json\",\n        run_dir / \"review-packets/generalist-b.json\",\n    ]:\n        packet = json.loads(packet_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n        packet_validator.validate(packet)\n        assert packet[\"context_policy\"][\"start_mode\"] == \"fresh_context\"\n        forbidden_text = \" \".join(action.lower() for action in packet[\"forbidden_actions\"])\n        for phrase in [\"modify files\", \"run tests\", \"produce patches\", \"execute scripts\", \"update evidence\"]:\n            assert phrase in forbidden_text\n"
    },
    {
      "path": "workflows/big-feature-contract-first/README.md",
      "size_bytes": 3032,
      "content": "# Workflow: big-feature-contract-first\n\n## Intent\n\nImplement a large feature through contract, BDD scenarios, impact map, verification gates, and evidence.\n\n## Typical outputs\n\n- task contract\n- BDD scenarios\n- impact map\n- implementation plan\n- evidence report\n- review/fusion reports when enabled\n\n## Operating context\n\nThe workflow starts with an operating-context preflight. A prior\n`project-initialization` run is useful but not mandatory: the required condition\nis enough project policy, workflow binding, verification gate, review policy and\nevidence-location context to execute the target workflow safely.\n\nOpen questions in the task contract are classified before the agent asks the\nhuman. `blocking-material` questions pause the workflow; nonblocking questions\nare recorded with defaults, limitations or follow-up handling.\n\n\n## Primary skills\n\n- contract-authoring\n- bdd-scenario-design\n- impact-map-builder\n- adr-consistency-check\n- evidence-reporting\n- reviewer-architecture\n- reviewer-verification\n- fusion-synthesis\n\n\n## Notes\n\nThis workflow is a composition recipe. Do not duplicate the full content of invoked skills here.\n\nPer ADR-0017, the implementation phase is to be framed by a pre-implementation\nred-capture (write the contract's acceptance tests, run them against the\nunimplemented state, capture the failing runs) and the verification gate's green\nre-run; the red→green evidence pair is a byproduct of this structure. `workflow.yaml`\nnow represents this topology with `test_framing` markers, and `validate_repo.py`\nchecks the structural framing.\n\nWhen effective strictness reaches the workflow's plan-gate depth, the workflow\nincludes a manifest-level `plan_gate` before red capture. The gate validates that\nthe plan is grounded, scoped, testable and ready for implementation; it is not a\nprose-only step. Project bindings inherit the workflow default unless they\nexplicitly record a strictness override reason.\n\nPassing the plan gate is necessary but not sufficient to enter red-capture. The\nworkflow includes a human-mediated `contract_acceptance` after the plan gate\nand before red-capture. The main agent presents the contract, behavior bindings,\nrisk surface profile, Failure Path Matrix, impact map and technical plan through\na `decision-contract.md` design review packet. That packet first lists the open\ndecisions, then reviews each blocking/material decision with options, tradeoffs,\nrecommended path, rationale and the exact human acceptance question. The human\naccepts decisions for red-capture, requests changes, or explicitly defers a\nnonblocking decision with residual risk. The agent records normalized\nper-decision results in `human-decisions.yaml` and updates run metadata before\nred-capture may begin.\n\nAfter review, fixes are classified as material or non-material before deciding\nwhether another review cycle is required. A P2 finding can still produce a\nmaterial fix if the fix changes schemas, validators, workflow policy, bindings,\nmandatory evidence or examples used as evidence.\n"
    },
    {
      "path": "workflows/big-feature-contract-first/workflow.yaml",
      "size_bytes": 18326,
      "content": "name: big-feature-contract-first\nversion: 0.1\nintent: Implement a large feature through contract, BDD scenarios, impact map, verification\n  gates, and evidence.\ndefault_strictness: L3\nentry_criteria:\n- Feature is large enough to risk scope creep or architectural drift.\noutputs:\n- task contract\n- risk surface profile in task contract\n- Failure Path Matrix in task contract when selected risk surfaces require it\n- BDD scenarios\n- impact map\n- implementation plan\n- evidence report\n- human decision packet when blocking questions exist\n- review/fusion reports when enabled\nuses:\n  skills:\n  - contract-authoring\n  - bdd-scenario-design\n  - impact-map-builder\n  - adr-consistency-check\n  - evidence-reporting\n  - reviewer-generalist\n  - reviewer-architecture\n  - reviewer-verification\n  - reviewer-adversarial\n  - fusion-synthesis\n  scripts:\n  - contract_lint\n  - gherkin_lint\n  - boundary_check\n  - impact_map_check\n  - evidence_validate\n  templates:\n  - task.contract.md\n  - repository-grounding-report.md\n  - plan.md\n  - task-breakdown.md\n  - decision-contract.md\n  - impact-map.yaml\n  - evidence-report.md\n  - human-questions.yaml\n  - human-decisions.yaml\n  - reviewer-report.md\n  - fusion-report.md\n  - finding-validation-report.md\n  - review-cycle-report.md\n  packs:\n  - agentic-system\n  - coding-agent\n  - backend-service\nreview:\n  topology: homogeneous-dual\n  composition: homogeneous\n  topology_source: workflow_default\n  risk_surface_escalation_policy:\n    default_topology: homogeneous-dual\n    allowed_escalated_topologies:\n    - homogeneous-plus-focused\n    - heterogeneous-variable\n    escalate_when_selected_surfaces_include:\n    - authority_boundary\n    - policy_authorization\n    - audit_persistence\n    - secret_handling\n    - data_privacy\n    - external_io\n    - filesystem_access\n    - network_access\n    - runtime_budget\n    - timeout\n    - persistence_consistency\n    - human_approval\n    - irreversible_action\n    rule: Use the smallest focused or heterogeneous reviewer set that maps to\n      existing reviewer role contracts.\n  reviewers:\n  - generalist-a\n  - generalist-b\n  prompt_policy:\n    same_prompt: true\n    same_packet: true\n    same_rubric: true\n    same_output_schema: true\n    focused_reviewers_require_explicit_focus_zone: true\n    focus_zones_may_overlap: true\n    all_reviewers_must_report_p0_p1_outside_focus: true\n  context_policy:\n    start_mode: fresh_context\n    fork_conversation_context: false\n    allowed_context_sources:\n    - review_packet\n    - referenced_artifacts\n  gates:\n  - contract_gate\n  - impact_gate\n  - plan_gate\n  - verification_gate\n  - evidence_gate\n  - fusion_gate\n  fusion_required: true\n  blocking_policy:\n    p0_blocks: true\n    p1_blocks: true\n    majority_cannot_override_blocker: true\n    missing_evidence: needs-additional-verification\nhuman_interaction:\n  mode: main-agent-mediated\n  reviewers_may_ask_human: false\n  pause_state: paused_waiting_for_human\n  question_artifact: human-questions.yaml\n  decision_artifact: human-decisions.yaml\n  allowed_pause_phases:\n  - operating_context_preflight\n  - contract\n  - contract_acceptance\n  - finding_validation\n  - final_decision\n  pause_on:\n  - unresolved_blocking_material_question\n  - scope_or_contract_amendment\n  - accepted_decision_or_adr_conflict\n  - exhausted_review_cycles\n  - final_human_acceptance_required_by_project_policy\noperating_context_preflight:\n  sufficient_context_required: true\n  prior_project_initialization_required: false\n  accepted_sources:\n  - project-operating-decisions.yaml\n  - workflow binding\n  - task contract\n  - explicit human decision packet\n  blockers:\n  - needs-project-binding\n  - needs-verification-gate\n  - needs-review-policy\n  - needs-evidence-location\n  - needs-red-capture-policy\n  - needs-human-authority-decision\nopen_question_policy:\n  classification_required: true\n  classifications:\n  - blocking-material\n  - nonblocking-follow-up\n  - nonblocking-known-limitation\n  - out-of-scope\n  default_behavior:\n    blocking-material: pause_for_human\n    nonblocking-follow-up: record_followup\n    nonblocking-known-limitation: record_default_or_limitation\n    out-of-scope: record_out_of_scope\n  grouped_decision_packet_required: true\nsupported_profiles:\n  strictness:\n  - L1\n  - L2\n  - L3\n  - L4\n  review_topologies:\n  - homogeneous-dual\n  - homogeneous-plus-focused\n  - heterogeneous-variable\nphases:\n- name: operating-context-preflight\n  id: operating_context_preflight\n  kind: planning\n  mode: human_guided\n  coordinator: main-agent\n  purpose: Confirm sufficient operating context for the target workflow before\n    contract drafting or implementation. The project may have completed\n    project-initialization, may be partly initialized, or may have been developed\n    with AgentsFlow from the start; missing required context is recorded as a\n    concrete blocker.\n  outputs:\n  - task contract operating context preflight\n  - human-questions.yaml when blocking questions exist\n  - human-decisions.yaml when answers are provided\n  human_interaction:\n    can_pause: true\n    required: conditional\n    prompt_source: task.contract.md open questions\n    question_artifact: human-questions.yaml\n    decision_artifact: human-decisions.yaml\n    response_artifact: task.contract.md\n    allowed_resume_states:\n    - answered\n    - unresolved\n- name: contract\n  purpose: Write the task contract draft, including operating context preflight,\n    selected risk surfaces, Failure Path Matrix when required, and classified\n    open questions.\n  skills:\n  - contract-authoring\n  - bdd-scenario-design\n  scripts:\n  - contract_lint\n  - gherkin_lint\n  outputs:\n  - task.contract.md\n  - risk surface profile in task.contract.md\n  - Failure Path Matrix in task.contract.md when selected risk surfaces require it\n  - grouped decision packet when needed\n  - draft contract awaiting human acceptance before red capture\n  id: contract\n  kind: specification\n  mode: human_guided\n  coordinator: main-agent\n  reserved_optional_actors:\n  - planning-agent\n  inputs:\n  - operating context preflight\n  human_interaction:\n    can_pause: true\n    required: conditional\n    prompt_source: task.contract.md open questions\n    question_artifact: human-questions.yaml\n    decision_artifact: human-decisions.yaml\n    response_artifact: task.contract.md\n    allowed_resume_states:\n    - answered\n    - unresolved\n- name: impact\n  purpose: Map changed areas to required checks.\n  skills:\n  - impact-map-builder\n  - adr-consistency-check\n  scripts:\n  - impact_map_check\n  outputs:\n  - impact map\n  id: impact\n  kind: specification\n  mode: human_guided\n  coordinator: main-agent\n  reserved_optional_actors:\n  - planning-agent\n- name: technical-plan\n  id: technical_plan\n  kind: specification\n  applies_to_strictness:\n  - L3\n  - L4\n  purpose: Produce the grounded plan artifacts required when effective strictness\n    includes the plan gate before red capture or implementation begins.\n  runs_after:\n  - impact\n  skills:\n  - contract-authoring\n  - impact-map-builder\n  scripts: []\n  templates:\n  - repository-grounding-report.md\n  - plan.md\n  - task-breakdown.md\n  - decision-contract.md\n  outputs:\n  - repository-grounding-report.md\n  - plan.md\n  - task-breakdown.md\n  - decision-contract.md\n- name: plan-gate\n  purpose: Validate that the implementation plan is grounded, scoped, testable\n    and ready for implementation before red capture or code changes begin.\n  skills:\n  - evidence-reporting\n  scripts: []\n  outputs:\n  - plan-gate-report.md\n  - plan-gate-report.json\n  id: plan_gate\n  kind: gate\n  gate: plan_gate\n  runs_after:\n  - technical_plan\n  applies_to_strictness:\n  - L3\n  - L4\n  owns_evidence_production: true\n- name: contract-acceptance\n  id: contract_acceptance\n  kind: decision\n  mode: human_guided\n  coordinator: main-agent\n  purpose: Human-mediated acceptance of the task contract, behavior bindings,\n    risk surface profile, Failure Path Matrix, impact map and technical plan\n    before red-capture or implementation begins. The main agent must first\n    present an open decision inventory and then review each blocking decision\n    with options, tradeoffs, recommendation and rationale.\n  runs_after:\n  - plan_gate\n  decision_review_contract:\n    artifact: decision-contract.md\n    required_before_prompt: true\n    required_sections:\n    - open_decision_inventory\n    - per_decision_options\n    - tradeoffs\n    - recommended_path\n    - rationale\n    - human_acceptance_question\n    acceptance_rule: Blocking decisions must be accepted, changed, or explicitly\n      deferred with residual risk before red-capture.\n  outputs:\n  - design decision review packet in decision-contract.md\n  - human contract acceptance decision in human-decisions.yaml\n  - per-decision acceptance or change requests in human-decisions.yaml\n  - accepted-for-red-capture status in run metadata\n  human_interaction:\n    can_pause: true\n    required: true\n    prompt_source: decision-contract.md plus task.contract.md, behavior bindings,\n      Failure Path Matrix, impact map and technical plan\n    question_artifact: human-questions.yaml\n    decision_artifact: human-decisions.yaml\n    response_artifact: run.yaml\n    allowed_resume_states:\n    - accepted_for_red_capture\n    - changes_requested\n    - rejected\n- name: red-capture\n  purpose: Turn contract scenarios into executable tests and run them against the\n    not-yet-implemented state, capturing the expected failing result. Required\n    failure-path rows selected in the contract must be bound or explicitly\n    deferred before this phase starts.\n  runs_after:\n  - plan_gate\n  - contract_acceptance\n  runs_after_policy: after_applicable_strictness_gate\n  skills:\n  - evidence-reporting\n  scripts:\n  - impact_map_check\n  - evidence_validate\n  outputs:\n  - red capture gate report\n  - failing-run evidence\n  id: red_capture\n  kind: verification\n  gate: verification_gate\n  test_framing: red_capture\n  owns_evidence_production: true\n- name: implementation\n  purpose: Implement within boundaries.\n  skills: []\n  scripts: []\n  outputs:\n  - diff\n  id: implementation\n  kind: implementation\n- name: verification_gate\n  purpose: Run required tests, deterministic checks, boundary checks, impact checks,\n    and evidence validation, including selected risk-surface/path-class coverage\n    and evidence freshness after the latest material change.\n  actor_class: verification_gate\n  may_run_tests: true\n  skills:\n  - evidence-reporting\n  scripts:\n  - boundary_check\n  - impact_map_check\n  - evidence_validate\n  outputs:\n  - verification gate report\n  - evidence bundle\n  - evidence report\n  - Failure Path Matrix coverage summary when applicable\n  id: verification_gate\n  kind: verification\n  test_framing: green_verify\n  owns_evidence_production: true\n  instruments:\n  - type: tests\n    source: workflow/profile\n  - type: deterministic_scripts\n    source: workflow scripts\n  - type: static_analysis\n    source: optional/profile\n  - type: dynamic_analysis\n    source: optional/profile\n  - type: domain_tools\n    source: optional/profile\n  gate: verification_gate\n- name: review\n  purpose: Run read-only independent review after the verification gate, using a\n    review packet that includes selected risk surfaces, Failure Path Matrix,\n    latest green evidence, known blockers and evidence freshness.\n  actor_class: review_agent\n  runs_after:\n  - verification_gate\n  read_only: true\n  may_run_tests: false\n  may_modify_files: false\n  skills:\n  - reviewer-generalist\n  scripts: []\n  outputs:\n  - reviewer reports\n  id: review\n  kind: review\n  default_permissions:\n    read: true\n    write: false\n    run_tests: false\n    run_verification_instruments: false\n    run_tools: false\n  explicit_tool_exceptions_allowed: true\n- name: fusion\n  id: fusion\n  kind: fusion\n  purpose: Synthesize candidate findings and preserve candidate blockers without\n    treating reviewer majority as authoritative truth.\n  skills:\n  - fusion-synthesis\n  scripts: []\n  runs_after:\n  - review\n  outputs:\n  - fusion-report.md\n- name: finding-validation\n  id: finding_validation\n  kind: finding_validation\n  purpose: Validate reviewer and fusion findings against the contract, diff,\n    verification evidence, accepted decisions and scope; record blocker status\n    and post-fix materiality classification before deciding whether another review\n    cycle is required.\n  runs_after:\n  - fusion\n  outputs:\n  - finding-validation-report.md\n  - review-cycle-report.md\n  human_interaction:\n    can_pause: true\n    required: conditional\n    prompt_source: finding-validation-report.md\n    question_artifact: human-questions.yaml\n    decision_artifact: human-decisions.yaml\n    response_artifact: finding-validation-report.md\n    allowed_resume_states:\n    - answered\n    - unresolved\n- name: final-decision\n  id: final_decision\n  kind: decision\n  purpose: Close the workflow when no validated blockers or mandatory evidence gaps\n    remain, or pause for final human acceptance when project policy requires it.\n  runs_after:\n  - finding_validation\n  outputs:\n  - final decision summary\n  human_interaction:\n    can_pause: true\n    required: conditional\n    prompt_source: review-cycle-report.md\n    question_artifact: human-questions.yaml\n    decision_artifact: human-decisions.yaml\n    response_artifact: final decision summary\n    allowed_resume_states:\n    - answered\n    - defaulted\n    - unresolved\nexit_criteria:\n- Required artifacts are produced.\n- Operating context preflight completed, or unresolved blocking-material items\n  are recorded as a workflow pause/blocker.\n- Selected risk surfaces are recorded, and required Failure Path Matrix rows are\n  bound to evidence or explicitly deferred with approved residual risk.\n- Required scripts pass or skipped items are explicitly justified.\n- Verification gate produced a gate report/evidence bundle.\n- Verification evidence is fresh after the latest material change.\n- Review agents ran after the verification gate and did not run tests/scripts themselves.\n- P0/P1 candidate findings were relevance-validated and no validated blockers or\n  mandatory evidence gaps remain.\n- Post-review fixes were classified as material or non-material before deciding\n  whether to rerun review.\n- Human final acceptance was recorded when required by project policy.\n- Evidence is sufficient for the effective strictness.\nreview_control_rules:\n  review_agents_read_only: true\n  review_agents_run_after: verification_gate\n  review_agents_may_run_tests: false\n  review_agents_may_modify_files: false\n  review_findings_are_candidate_findings: true\n  main_agent_must_validate_finding_relevance: true\n  unvalidated_findings_are_not_truth: true\n  p0_p1_findings_must_not_be_silently_discarded: true\n  missing_verification_is_reported_as_finding: true\n  candidate_blockers_must_be_validated: true\n  default_exit_when_no_validated_blocking_findings: true\n  missing_mandatory_evidence_blocks_acceptance: true\n  p0_p1_findings_require_recorded_validation: true\n  post_fix_materiality_classification_required: true\nreview_cycle:\n  default_exit_when: no_validated_blocking_findings\n  max_review_cycles_required: false\n  max_review_cycles_source: project_policy_or_workflow_binding\n  max_review_cycles_absent_means: unlimited\n  rerun_review_on:\n  - accepted_blocker_fixed\n  - mandatory_evidence_added\n  - contract_changed\n  - material_artifact_change\n  - verification_gate_materially_changed\n  - human_requested\n  do_not_rerun_on:\n  - nonblocking_findings_with_non_material_fixes_only\n  - duplicate_consolidation\n  - irrelevant_findings_rejected_with_reason\n  - fusion_rewording_only\n  materiality_classification:\n    required_after_review_fixes: true\n    material_triggers_take_precedence_over_do_not_rerun: true\n    evidence_freshness_after_material_change_required: true\n    material_if_changes:\n    - task_contract_or_scope\n    - selected_risk_surfaces_or_failure_path_matrix\n    - behavior_bindings\n    - affected_implementation_behavior\n    - workflow_or_gate_policy\n    - review_cycle_policy\n    - schema_or_validator\n    - project_overlay_or_binding\n    - review_packet_content\n    - mandatory_evidence\n    - verification_gate_output\n    - examples_used_as_evidence\n    non_material_if_only:\n    - report_editorial_changes_only\n    - duplicate_consolidation\n    - non_source_of_truth_notes\n  supplemental_review:\n    allowed_when_requested_by_human: true\n    requires_recorded_reason: true\n    findings_remain_candidate: true\n    reopens_fix_loop_only_on_validated_p0_p1_or_mandatory_evidence_gap: true\n  blocking_default:\n    severities:\n    - P0\n    - P1\n    missing_mandatory_evidence_blocks: true\n    majority_cannot_override_candidate_blocker: true\n  validation_required_for:\n  - P0\n  - P1\n  - fusion_candidate_blockers\n  - mandatory_evidence_gaps\n  final_states:\n  - pass\n  - pass-with-notes\n  - needs-changes\n  - needs-verification-evidence\n  - human-decision-required\n  - blocked\nactor_model:\n  planning:\n    mode: human_guided\n    coordinator: main-agent\n    reserved_optional_actors:\n    - planning-agent\n  implementation_agent:\n    status: reserved_future_actor\nverification:\n  gate_owns_evidence_production: true\n  allowed_instrument_classes:\n  - tests\n  - deterministic_scripts\n  - static_analysis\n  - dynamic_analysis\n  - debuggers\n  - trace_analysis\n  - log_analysis\n  - network_traffic_analysis\n  - profilers\n  - fuzzers\n  - benchmarks\n  - security_scanners\n  - domain_tools\nreview_agent_permissions:\n  default:\n    read: true\n    write: false\n    run_tests: false\n    run_verification_instruments: false\n    run_tools: false\n  explicit_tool_exceptions_allowed: true\n  tool_exception_rule: Must be declared in workflow, reviewer manifest, or prompt;\n    observations remain candidate findings.\nfusion:\n  role: read_only_synthesis\n  may_launch_reviewers: false\n  may_run_gates: false\n  may_request_additional_review: true\nconcrete_gates:\n- contract_gate\n- evidence_gate\n- fusion_gate\n- impact_gate\n- plan_gate\n- verification_gate\nmvp_status: v0.2-mvp\nbinding_model:\n  upstream_workflow_definition: true\n  requires_project_binding_for_execution: true\n  project_binding_artifact: .agentsflow/workflows/big-feature-contract-first.binding.yaml\n  workflow_run_contains_task_artifacts: true\nbehavior_binding_policy:\n  required_acceptance_scenarios_need_bindings: true\n  canonical_artifact: '*.bindings.yaml'\n  specification_only_scenarios_allowed: true\n"
    },

      "path": "workflows/pr-merge-readiness/workflow.yaml",
      "size_bytes": 9989,
      "content": "name: pr-merge-readiness\nversion: 0.1\nintent: Decide whether a branch has enough recorded evidence, review output and\n  human approval to open, accept or merge as a pull request.\ndefault_strictness: L3\nentry_criteria:\n- Branch, base branch and intended commit range are known.\n- Verification and review evidence are available or explicitly marked blocked.\n- A human merge decision will be recorded before accepted merge-ready status.\noutputs:\n- pr-merge-readiness report\n- evidence summary\n- review and fusion reports\n- finding validation report\n- human merge decision record\nuses:\n  skills:\n  - evidence-reporting\n  - reviewer-verification\n  - reviewer-architecture\n  - reviewer-adversarial\n  - fusion-synthesis\n  scripts:\n  - validate_repo\n  - evidence_validate\n  templates:\n  - pr-merge-readiness-report.json\n  - evidence-report.md\n  - reviewer-report.md\n  - fusion-report.md\n  - finding-validation-report.md\n  - human-decisions.yaml\n  packs:\n  - agentic-system\n  - coding-agent\nsupported_profiles:\n  strictness:\n  - L2\n  - L3\n  - L4\n  review_topologies:\n  - homogeneous-dual\n  - homogeneous-plus-focused\n  - heterogeneous-variable\nreview:\n  topology: heterogeneous-variable\n  composition: heterogeneous\n  provider_strategy: provider-mirrored-topic-pairs\n  reviewers:\n  - verification-codex\n  - verification-claude\n  - architecture-codex\n  - architecture-claude\n  - adversarial-codex\n  - adversarial-claude\n  topic_pairs:\n  - topic: verification-evidence\n    role: verification\n    providers:\n    - internal-agent\n    - claude-code\n  - topic: architecture-process\n    role: architecture\n    providers:\n    - internal-agent\n    - claude-code\n  - topic: adversarial-authority\n    role: adversarial\n    providers:\n    - internal-agent\n    - claude-code\n  prompt_policy:\n    focus_prompts_required: true\n    focus_zones_may_overlap: true\n    all_reviewers_must_report_p0_p1_outside_focus: true\n    same_output_schema: true\n  context_policy:\n    start_mode: fresh_context\n    fork_conversation_context: false\n    allowed_context_sources:\n    - review_packet\n    - referenced_artifacts\n  focus_zones:\n  - reviewer: verification-codex\n    role: verification\n    primary_focus:\n    - verification evidence\n    - red/green freshness\n    - missing or stale artifacts\n  - reviewer: verification-claude\n    role: verification\n    primary_focus:\n    - verification evidence\n    - red/green freshness\n    - missing or stale artifacts\n  - reviewer: architecture-codex\n    role: architecture\n    primary_focus:\n    - workflow boundary\n    - self-application artifact separation\n    - methodology consistency\n  - reviewer: architecture-claude\n    role: architecture\n    primary_focus:\n    - workflow boundary\n    - self-application artifact separation\n    - methodology consistency\n  - reviewer: adversarial-codex\n    role: adversarial\n    primary_focus:\n    - false readiness claims\n    - missing human approval\n    - mock-vs-live external review evidence\n  - reviewer: adversarial-claude\n    role: adversarial\n    primary_focus:\n    - false readiness claims\n    - missing human approval\n    - mock-vs-live external review evidence\n  gates:\n  - verification_gate\n  - evidence_gate\n  - fusion_gate\n  fusion_required: true\n  blocking_policy:\n    p0_blocks: true\n    p1_blocks: true\n    majority_cannot_override_blocker: true\n    missing_evidence: blocked\nphases:\n- name: readiness-intake\n  id: readiness_intake\n  kind: specification\n  mode: human_guided\n  coordinator: main-agent\n  purpose: Record branch, base branch, commit range, worktree state and required\n    evidence policy.\n  outputs:\n  - readiness intake\n- name: evidence-collection\n  id: evidence_collection\n  kind: reporting\n  runs_after:\n  - readiness_intake\n  purpose: Collect deterministic check evidence and evidence references from the\n    project-bound run.\n  skills:\n  - evidence-reporting\n  scripts:\n  - validate_repo\n  - evidence_validate\n  outputs:\n  - evidence summary\n  - command evidence paths\n- name: evidence-gate\n  id: evidence_gate\n  kind: verification\n  runs_after:\n  - evidence_collection\n  purpose: Validate that required evidence artifacts exist before independent\n    reviewers are used as gate evidence.\n  gate: evidence_gate\n  skills:\n  - evidence-reporting\n  scripts:\n  - evidence_validate\n  outputs:\n  - evidence gate report\n- name: provider-mirrored-review\n  id: provider_mirrored_review\n  kind: review\n  runs_after:\n  - evidence_gate\n  purpose: Run provider-mirrored topic-pair review over the same readiness\n    packet and output schema.\n  skills:\n  - reviewer-verification\n  - reviewer-architecture\n  - reviewer-adversarial\n  scripts: []\n  outputs:\n  - provider-mirrored reviewer reports\n  default_permissions:\n    read: true\n    write: false\n    run_tests: false\n    run_verification_instruments: false\n    run_tools: false\n- name: fusion\n  id: fusion\n  kind: fusion\n  runs_after:\n  - provider_mirrored_review\n  purpose: Synthesize reviewer agreement, disagreement and candidate blockers\n    without majority-voting away P0/P1 findings.\n  skills:\n  - fusion-synthesis\n  scripts: []\n  outputs:\n  - fusion report\n  actor_class: fusion_agent\n  role: read_only_synthesis\n  may_launch_reviewers: false\n  may_run_gates: false\n  may_request_additional_review: true\n- name: finding-validation\n  id: finding_validation\n  kind: finding_validation\n  runs_after:\n  - fusion\n  purpose: Validate reviewer and fusion candidate findings against scope,\n    evidence, accepted decisions and collision-control rules.\n  outputs:\n  - finding validation report\n  - review cycle report\n- name: human-merge-decision\n  id: human_merge_decision\n  kind: decision\n  runs_after:\n  - finding_validation\n  mode: human_guided\n  coordinator: main-agent\n  purpose: Record the human-owned decision to accept, reject or defer merge\n    readiness.\n  human_interaction:\n    required: true\n    question_artifact: human-questions.yaml\n    decision_artifact: human-decisions.yaml\n  outputs:\n  - human merge decision record\n- name: readiness-report\n  id: readiness_report\n  kind: reporting\n  runs_after:\n  - human_merge_decision\n  purpose: Produce the final branch-scoped readiness report from validated\n    evidence, review output and human decision state.\n  skills:\n  - evidence-reporting\n  outputs:\n  - pr-merge-readiness-report.json\nexit_criteria:\n- Readiness report validates against `schemas/pr-merge-readiness-report.schema.json`.\n- Accepted merge-ready status has recorded human merge approval bound to the\n  current material change and exact readiness report hash.\n- Missing evidence, stale review evidence and live-vs-mock external review gaps\n  are recorded as blockers or non-accepted states.\n- Rejected or downgraded P0/P1 candidate findings have collision-control evidence.\nreview_control_rules:\n  review_agents_read_only: true\n  review_agents_run_after: evidence_gate\n  review_agents_may_run_tests: false\n  review_agents_may_modify_files: false\n  review_findings_are_candidate_findings: true\n  main_agent_must_validate_finding_relevance: true\n  unvalidated_findings_are_not_truth: true\n  p0_p1_findings_must_not_be_silently_discarded: true\n  missing_verification_is_reported_as_finding: true\n  candidate_blockers_must_be_validated: true\n  default_exit_when_no_validated_blocking_findings: true\n  missing_mandatory_evidence_blocks_acceptance: true\n  p0_p1_findings_require_recorded_validation: true\n  post_fix_materiality_classification_required: true\nreview_cycle:\n  default_exit_when: no_validated_blocking_findings\n  max_review_cycles_required: false\n  max_review_cycles_source: project_policy_or_workflow_binding\n  max_review_cycles_absent_means: unlimited\n  rerun_review_on:\n  - mandatory_evidence_added\n  - accepted_blocker_fixed\n  - material_artifact_change\n  - verification_gate_materially_changed\n  - human_requested\n  do_not_rerun_on:\n  - nonblocking_findings_with_non_material_fixes_only\n  - duplicate_consolidation\n  - irrelevant_findings_rejected_with_reason\n  - fusion_rewording_only\n  materiality_classification:\n    required_after_review_fixes: true\n    material_triggers_take_precedence_over_do_not_rerun: true\n    material_if_changes:\n    - selected_risk_surfaces_or_failure_path_matrix\n    - review_packet_content\n    - workflow_or_gate_policy\n    - schema_or_validator\n    - mandatory_evidence\n    - verification_gate_output\n    - examples_used_as_evidence\n    non_material_if_only:\n    - report_editorial_changes_only\n    - duplicate_consolidation\n    - non_source_of_truth_notes\n  blocking_default:\n    severities:\n    - P0\n    - P1\n    missing_mandatory_evidence_blocks: true\n    majority_cannot_override_candidate_blocker: true\n  validation_required_for:\n  - P0\n  - P1\n  - fusion_candidate_blockers\n  - mandatory_evidence_gaps\n  final_states:\n  - pass\n  - pass-with-notes\n  - needs-changes\n  - needs-verification-evidence\n  - human-decision-required\n  - blocked\nactor_model:\n  planning:\n    mode: human_guided\n    coordinator: main-agent\n  implementation_agent:\n    status: not_applicable\nverification:\n  gate_owns_evidence_production: true\n  allowed_instrument_classes:\n  - tests\n  - deterministic_scripts\n  - static_analysis\n  - documentation_consistency\nreview_agent_permissions:\n  default:\n    read: true\n    write: false\n    run_tests: false\n    run_verification_instruments: false\n    run_tools: false\n  explicit_tool_exceptions_allowed: true\n  tool_exception_rule: Must be declared in workflow, reviewer manifest, or prompt;\n    observations remain candidate findings.\nfusion:\n  role: read_only_synthesis\n  may_launch_reviewers: false\n  may_run_gates: false\n  may_request_additional_review: true\nmvp_status: v0.2-utility\nbinding_model:\n  upstream_workflow_definition: true\n  requires_project_binding_for_execution: true\n  project_binding_artifact: .agentsflow/workflows/pr-merge-readiness.binding.yaml\n  workflow_run_contains_task_artifacts: true\nbehavior_binding_policy:\n  required_acceptance_scenarios_need_bindings: true\n  canonical_artifact: '*.bindings.yaml'\n  specification_only_scenarios_allowed: true\n"
